ar: تَبَٰرَكَ ٱلَّذِي بِيَدِهِ ٱلۡمُلۡكُ وَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيۡءࣲ قَدِيرٌ
t: Tabaraka allathee biyadihi almulku wahuwa AAala kulli shayin qadeerun
u: Nihayat buzurg-o-bartar hai woh jiske haath mein qayinaat ki sultanat hai , aur woh har cheez par qudrat rakhta hai

ar: ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَ ٱلۡمَوۡتَ وَٱلۡحَيَوٰةَ لِيَبۡلُوَكُمۡ أَيُّكُمۡ أَحۡسَنُ عَمَلࣰ اۚ وَهُوَ ٱلۡعَزِيزُ ٱلۡغَفُورُ
t: Allathee khalaqa almawta waalhayata liyabluwakum ayyukum ahsanu AAamalan wahuwa alAAazeezu alghafooru
u: Jisne maut aur zindagi ko ijaat kiya taa-ke tum logon ko aazma kar dekhey tum mein se kaun behtar amal karne wala hai, aur woh zabardast bhi hai aur darguzar farmane wala bhi

ar: ٱلَّذِي خَلَقَ سَبۡعَ سَمَٰوَٰتࣲ طِبَاقࣰ اۖ مَّا تَرَىٰ فِي خَلۡقِ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِ مِن تَفَٰوُتࣲۖ فَٱرۡجِعِ ٱلۡبَصَرَ هَلۡ تَرَىٰ مِن فُطُورࣲ‏
t: Allathee khalaqa sabAAa samawatin tibaqan ma tara fee khalqi alrrahmani min tafawutin fairjiAAi albasara hal tara min futoorin
u: Jisne teh-bar-teh saat (seven) aasman banaye tum Rehman ki takhleeq(creation) mein kisi kism ki be-rabti (incongruity) na paogey phir palat kar dekho, kahin tumhein koi khalal (flaw) nazar aata hai

ar: ثُمَّ ٱرۡجِعِ ٱلۡبَصَرَ كَرَّتَيۡنِ يَنقَلِبۡ إِلَيۡكَ ٱلۡبَصَرُ خَاسِئࣰ ا وَهُوَ حَسِيرࣱ‏
t: Thumma irjiAAi albasara karratayni yanqalib ilayka albasaru khasian wahuwa haseerun
u: Baar baar nigaah daudao tumhari nigaah thak kar na-murad palat aayegi

ar: وَلَقَدۡ زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنۡيَا بِمَصَٰبِيحَ وَجَعَلۡنَٰهَا رُجُومࣰ ا لِّلشَّيَٰطِينِۖ وَأَعۡتَدۡنَا لَهُمۡ عَذَابَ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
t: Walaqad zayyanna alssamaa alddunya bimasabeeha wajaAAalnaha rujooman lilshshayateeni waaAAtadna lahum AAathaba alssaAAeeri
u: Humne tumhare kareeb ke aasman ko azeem-o-shaan chiragon se aarasta (adorned /beautify) kiya hai aur unhein shayateen ko maar bhagane ka zariya bana diya hai. In shaytano ke liye bhadakti hui aag humne muhayya kar rakkhi hai

ar: وَلِلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ بِرَبِّهِمۡ عَذَابُ جَهَنَّمَۖ وَبِئۡسَ ٱلۡمَصِيرُ
t: Walillatheena kafaroo birabbihim AAathabu jahannama wabisa almaseeru
u: Jin logon ne apne Rubb se kufr kiya hai unke liye jahannum ka azaab hai aur woh bahut hi bura thikana hai

ar: إِذَآ أُلۡقُواْ فِيهَا سَمِعُواْ لَهَا شَهِيقࣰ ا وَهِيَ تَفُورُ
t: Itha olqoo feeha samiAAoo laha shaheeqan wahiya tafooru
u: Jab woh usmein phenke jayenge to uske dhahadne (roar) ki haulnaak aawaz sunengey aur woh josh kha rahi hogi

ar: تَكَادُ تَمَيَّزُ مِنَ ٱلۡغَيۡظِۖ كُلَّمَآ أُلۡقِيَ فِيهَا فَوۡجࣱ سَأَلَهُمۡ خَزَنَتُهَآ أَلَمۡ يَأۡتِكُمۡ نَذِيرࣱ‏
t: Takadu tamayyazu mina alghaythi kullama olqiya feeha fawjun saalahum khazanatuha alam yatikum natheerun
u: Shiddat-e-gazab se phati jati hogi, har baar jab koi anbwah (multitude/group) us mein dala jayega uske kaarinde (keepers) un logon se puchenge “kya tumhare paas koi khabardaar karne wala nahin aaya tha?”

ar: قَالُواْ بَلَىٰ قَدۡ جَآءَنَا نَذِيرࣱ فَكَذَّبۡنَا وَقُلۡنَا مَا نَزَّلَ ٱللَّهُ مِن شَيۡءٍ إِنۡ أَنتُمۡ إِلَّا فِي ضَلَٰلࣲ كَبِيرࣲ‏
t: Qaloo bala qad jaana natheerun fakaththabna waqulna ma nazzala Allahu min shayin in antum illa fee dalalin kabeerin
u: Woh jawab denge “haan ,khabardaar karne wala hamare paas aaya tha,magar humne usey jhutla diya aur kaha Allah ne kuch bhi nazil nahin kiya hai, tum badi gumraahi mein padey huey ho”

ar: وَقَالُواْ لَوۡ كُنَّا نَسۡمَعُ أَوۡ نَعۡقِلُ مَا كُنَّا فِيٓ أَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
t: Waqaloo law kunna nasmaAAu aw naAAqilu ma kunna fee ashabi alssaAAeeri
u: Aur woh kahenge “kaash hum sunte ya samajhte to aaj is bhadakti hui aag ke sazawaron mein na shamil hotey”

ar: فَٱعۡتَرَفُواْ بِذَنۢبِهِمۡ فَسُحۡقࣰ ا لِّأَصۡحَٰبِ ٱلسَّعِيرِ
u: Is tarah woh apne kasoor ka khud aitraaf (confess) kar lengey, laanat hai in dozakhiyon par

ar: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ يَخۡشَوۡنَ رَبَّهُم بِٱلۡغَيۡبِ لَهُم مَّغۡفِرَةࣱ وَأَجۡرࣱ كَبِيرࣱ‏
t: Inna allatheena yakhshawna rabbahum bialghaybi lahum maghfiratun waajrun kabeerun
u: Jo log be-dekhe apne Rubb se darte hai , yaqeenan unke liye magfirat hai aur bada ajar

ar: وَأَسِرُّواْ قَوۡلَكُمۡ أَوِ ٱجۡهَرُواْ بِهِۦٓۖ إِنَّهُۥ عَلِيمُۢ بِذَاتِ ٱلصُّدُورِ
t: Waasirroo qawlakum awi ijharoo bihi innahu AAaleemun bithati alssudoori
u: Tum khwah chupke se baat karo ya unchi aawaz se (Allah ke liye yaksa hai) woh to dilon ka haal tak jaanta hai

ar: أَلَا يَعۡلَمُ مَنۡ خَلَقَ وَهُوَ ٱللَّطِيفُ ٱلۡخَبِيرُ
t: Ala yaAAlamu man khalaqa wahuwa allateefu alkhabeeru
u: Kya wahi na jaanega jisne paida kiya hai? Halanke woh baareek-been aur bakhabar hai

ar: هُوَ ٱلَّذِي جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ ذَلُولࣰ ا فَٱمۡشُواْ فِي مَنَاكِبِهَا وَكُلُواْ مِن رِّزۡقِهِۦۖ وَإِلَيۡهِ ٱلنُّشُورُ
t: Huwa allathee jaAAala lakumu alarda thaloolan faimshoo fee manakibiha wakuloo min rizqihi wailayhi alnnushooru
u: Wahi to hai jisne tumhare liye zameen ko taabeh kar rakkha hai , chalo uski chaati par aur khao khuda ka rizq, usi ke huzoor tumhein dobara zinda ho kar jana hai

ar: ءَأَمِنتُم مَّن فِي ٱلسَّمَآءِ أَن يَخۡسِفَ بِكُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ فَإِذَا هِيَ تَمُورُ
t: Aamintum man fee alssamai an yakhsifa bikumu alarda faitha hiya tamooru
u: Kya tum issey be-khauf ho ke woh jo aasman mein hai tumhein zameen mein dhasa de aur yakayak yeh zameen jhakoley khane lagey (shake/rock violently)

ar: أَمۡ أَمِنتُم مَّن فِي ٱلسَّمَآءِ أَن يُرۡسِلَ عَلَيۡكُمۡ حَاصِبࣰ اۖ فَسَتَعۡلَمُونَ كَيۡفَ نَذِيرِ
t: Am amintum man fee alssamai an yursila AAalaykum hasiban fasataAAlamoona kayfa natheeri
u: Kya tum issey be-khauf ho ke wo jo aasman mein hai tum par pathrao karne wali hawa bhej de? Phir tumhein maloom ho jayega ke meri tambeeh (warning) kaisi hoti hai

ar: وَلَقَدۡ كَذَّبَ ٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبۡلِهِمۡ فَكَيۡفَ كَانَ نَكِيرِ
t: Walaqad kaththaba allatheena min qablihim fakayfa kana nakeeri
u: Inse pehle guzre huey log jhutla chuke hain phir dekhlo ke meri giraft kaisi sakht thi

ar: أَوَلَمۡ يَرَوۡاْ إِلَى ٱلطَّيۡرِ فَوۡقَهُمۡ صَٰٓفَّٰتࣲ وَيَقۡبِضۡنَۚ مَا يُمۡسِكُهُنَّ إِلَّا ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُۚ إِنَّهُۥ بِكُلِّ شَيۡءِۭ بَصِيرٌ
t: Awalam yaraw ila alttayri fawqahum saffatin wayaqbidna ma yumsikuhunna illa alrrahmanu innahu bikulli shayin baseerun
u: Kya yeh log apne upar udney waley parindon ko par phaylaye aur sukedte nahin dekhte? Rehman ke siwa koi nahin jo inhein thamey huey ho. Wahi har cheez ka nigehbaan hai

ar: أَمَّنۡ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِي هُوَ جُندࣱ لَّكُمۡ يَنصُرُكُم مِّن دُونِ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِۚ إِنِ ٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ إِلَّا فِي غُرُورٍ
t: Amman hatha allathee huwa jundun lakum yansurukum min dooni alrrahmani ini alkafiroona illa fee ghuroorin
u: Batao, aakhir woh kaunsa lashkar tumhare paas hai jo Rehman ke muqable mein tumhari madad kar sakta hai? Haqeeqat yeh hai ke yeh mukireen dhoke mein padey huey hain

ar: أَمَّنۡ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِي يَرۡزُقُكُمۡ إِنۡ أَمۡسَكَ رِزۡقَهُۥۚ بَل لَّجُّواْ فِي عُتُوࣲّ وَنُفُورٍ
t: Amman hatha allathee yarzuqukum in amsaka rizqahu bal lajjoo fee AAutuwwin wanufoorin
u: Ya phir batao, kaun hai jo tumhein rizq de sakta hai agar Rehman apna rizq roak ley? Dar-asal yeh log sarkashi aur haqq se gurez par adey huey hai

ar: أَفَمَن يَمۡشِي مُكِبًّا عَلَىٰ وَجۡهِهِۦٓ أَهۡدَىٰٓ أَمَّن يَمۡشِي سَوِيًّا عَلَىٰ صِرَٰطࣲ مُّسۡتَقِيمࣲ‏
t: Afaman yamshee mukibban AAala wajhihi ahda amman yamshee sawiyyan AAala siratin mustaqeemin
u: Bhala socho, jo shaks mooh aundhaey (grovelling) chal raha ho woh zyada sahih raah paney wala hai ya woh jo sar uthaye seedha ek hamwar sadak par chal raha ho

ar: قُلۡ هُوَ ٱلَّذِيٓ أَنشَأَكُمۡ وَجَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلسَّمۡعَ وَٱلۡأَبۡصَٰرَ وَٱلۡأَفۡـِٔدَةَۚ قَلِيلࣰ ا مَّا تَشۡكُرُونَ
t: Qul huwa allathee anshaakum wajaAAala lakumu alssamAAa waalabsara waalafidata qaleelan ma tashkuroona
u: Inse kaho Allah hi hai jisne tumhein paida kiya, tumko sunney aur dekhne ki taaqatein di aur sochne samajhne waley dil diye, magar tum kam hi shukr ada karte ho

ar: قُلۡ هُوَ ٱلَّذِي ذَرَأَكُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَإِلَيۡهِ تُحۡشَرُونَ
t: Qul huwa allathee tharaakum fee alardi wailayhi tuhsharoona
u: Insey kaho, Allah hi hai jisne tumhein zameen mein phailaya hai aur usi ki taraf tum sametey jaogey

ar: وَيَقُولُونَ مَتَىٰ هَٰذَا ٱلۡوَعۡدُ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰدِقِينَ
t: Wayaqooloona mata hatha alwaAAdu in kuntum sadiqeena
u: Yeh kehte hain “Agar tum sacchey ho to batao yeh wada kab poora hoga?”

ar: قُلۡ إِنَّمَا ٱلۡعِلۡمُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ وَإِنَّمَآ أَنَا۠ نَذِيرࣱ مُّبِينࣱ‏
t: Qul innama alAAilmu AAinda Allahi wainnama ana natheerun mubeenun
u: Kaho “Iska ilm to Allah ke paas hai, main to bas saaf saaf khabardar kardene wala hoon

ar: فَلَمَّا رَأَوۡهُ زُلۡفَةࣰ سِيٓـَٔتۡ وُجُوهُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ وَقِيلَ هَٰذَا ٱلَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَدَّعُونَ
t: Falamma raawhu zulfatan seeat wujoohu allatheena kafaroo waqeela hatha allathee kuntum bihi taddaAAoona
u: Phir jab yeh us cheez ko kareeb dekh lenge to un sab logon ke chehre bigad jayenge jinhon ne inkar kiya hai, aur us waqt unse kaha jayega ke yahi hai woh cheez jiske liye tum takazey kar rahey (ask for) thay

ar: قُلۡ أَرَءَيۡتُمۡ إِنۡ أَهۡلَكَنِيَ ٱللَّهُ وَمَن مَّعِيَ أَوۡ رَحِمَنَا فَمَن يُجِيرُ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ مِنۡ عَذَابٍ أَلِيمࣲ‏
t: Qul araaytum in ahlakaniya Allahu waman maAAiya aw rahimana faman yujeeru alkafireena min AAathabin aleemin
u: Insey kaho, kabhi tumne yeh bhi socha ke Allah khwa mujhey aur mere saathiyon ko halaaq karde ya hum par Reham karey, kafiron ko dardnaak azaab se kaun bacha lega

ar: قُلۡ هُوَ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦ وَعَلَيۡهِ تَوَكَّلۡنَاۖ فَسَتَعۡلَمُونَ مَنۡ هُوَ فِي ضَلَٰلࣲ مُّبِينࣲ‏
t: Qul huwa alrrahmanu amanna bihi waAAalayhi tawakkalna fasataAAlamoona man huwa fee dalalin mubeenin
u: Insey kaho, woh bada Raheem hai, usi par hum imaan laye hain, aur usi par hamara bharosa hai, ankareeb tumhein maloom ho jayega ke sareeh gumrahi (manifest error) mein pada hua kaun hai

ar: قُلۡ أَرَءَيۡتُمۡ إِنۡ أَصۡبَحَ مَآؤُكُمۡ غَوۡرࣰ ا فَمَن يَأۡتِيكُم بِمَآءࣲ مَّعِينِۭ
t: Qul araaytum in asbaha maokum ghawran faman yateekum bimain maAAeenin
u: Inse kaho, kabhi tumne yeh bhi socha ke agar tumhare kuwon (wells) ka pani zameen mein utar jaye to kaun hai jo is pani ki behti hui sotein (flowing water) tumhein nikal kar la dega
Noon, Kasam hai qalam ki aur us cheez ki jisey likhne waley likh rahey hain
Tum apne Rubb ke fazl se majnoon (deewane) nahin ho
Aur yaqeenan tumhare liye aisa ajar (reward) hai jiska silsila kabhi khatm honay wala nahin
Aur beshak tum akhlaaq ke bade martabe par ho
Anqareeb tum bhi dekh logey aur woh bhi dekh lenge
Ke tum mein se kaun junoon (madness) mein mubtala hai

ar: إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعۡلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِۦ وَهُوَ أَعۡلَمُ بِٱلۡمُهۡتَدِينَ
t: Inna rabbaka huwa aAAlamu biman dalla AAan sabeelihi wahuwa aAAlamu bialmuhtadeena
u: Tumhara Rubb un logon ko bhi khoob jaanta hai jo uski raah se bhatkey huey hain , aur wahi unko bhi acchi tarah jaanta hai jo raah-e-raast par hai
Lihaza tum in jhutlane walon ke dabao mein hargiz na aao
yeh to chahte hain ke kuch tum mudahnat (narmi) karo to yeh bhi mudahnat (narmi) karein
Hargiz na dabo kisi aisey shaks se jo bahut kasmein khane wala be-waqaat (worthless) aadmi hai
Taaney deta hai , chugliyan khata phirta hai (slanderer, gossip-monger)
Bhalayi se rokta hai , zulm-o-zyadti mein hadd se guzar janey wala hai, sakht badh-amal hai , jafa-kaar hai
Aur in sab uyub (aib) ke saath badh-asl (illegitimate child) hai
Is bina par ke woh bahut maal-o-aulad rakhta hai

ar: إِذَا تُتۡلَىٰ عَلَيۡهِ ءَايَٰتُنَا قَالَ أَسَٰطِيرُ ٱلۡأَوَّلِينَ
t: Itha tutla AAalayhi ayatuna qala asateeru alawwaleena
u: Jab hamari aayat usko sunayi jati hai to kehta hai yeh to agle waqton ke afsane hain
Ankareeb hum iski sund (snout) par daag lagayenge

ar: إِنَّا بَلَوۡنَٰهُمۡ كَمَا بَلَوۡنَآ أَصۡحَٰبَ ٱلۡجَنَّةِ إِذۡ أَقۡسَمُواْ لَيَصۡرِمُنَّهَا مُصۡبِحِينَ
t: Inna balawnahum kama balawna ashaba aljannati ith aqsamoo layasrimunnaha musbiheena
u: Humne in (ehle makkah) ko usi taraah aazmaish mein dala hai jis tarah ek baagh (garden) ke maalikon ko aazmaish mein dala tha, jab unhon ne kasam khayi ke subah sawerey zaroor apne baagh ke phal todenge
Aur woh koi istasna (exception) nahin kar rahey thay

ar: فَطَافَ عَلَيۡهَا طَآئِفࣱ مِّن رَّبِّكَ وَهُمۡ نَآئِمُونَ
t: Fatafa AAalayha taifun min rabbika wahum naimoona
u: Raat ko woh soye padey thay ke tumhare Rubb ki taraf se ek balaa is baagh par phir gayi
Aur uska haal aisa ho gaya jaise kati hui fasal ho
Subah un logon ne ek dusre ko pukara

ar: أَنِ ٱغۡدُواْ عَلَىٰ حَرۡثِكُمۡ إِن كُنتُمۡ صَٰرِمِينَ
t: Ani ighdoo AAala harthikum in kuntum sarimeena
u: Kaha agar phal todne hai ho to sawerey sawerey apni kheti ki taraf nikal chalo
Chunanchey woh chal padey aur aapas mein chupke chupke kehte jatay thay

ar: أَن لَّا يَدۡخُلَنَّهَا ٱلۡيَوۡمَ عَلَيۡكُم مِّسۡكِينࣱ‏
t: An la yadkhulannaha alyawma AAalaykum miskeenun
u: Ke aaj koi miskeen tumhare paas baag mein na aane paye
Woh kuch na dene ka faisla kiye huye subah sawerey jaldi jaldi is tarah wahan gaye jaise ke woh (phal todne par) qadir hain
Magar jab baagh ko dekha to kehne lagey “hum raasta bhool gaye hain
Nahin balke hum mehroom reh gaye”

ar: قَالَ أَوۡسَطُهُمۡ أَلَمۡ أَقُل لَّكُمۡ لَوۡلَا تُسَبِّحُونَ
t: Qala awsatuhum alam aqul lakum lawla tusabbihoona
u: Un mein jo sab se behtar aadmi tha usne kaha “maine tumse kaha na tha ke tum tasbeeh kyun nahin karte?”

ar: قَالُواْ سُبۡحَٰنَ رَبِّنَآ إِنَّا كُنَّا ظَٰلِمِينَ
t: Qaloo subhana rabbina inna kunna thalimeena
u: Woh pukar utthey paak hai hamara Rubb, waqayi hum gunahgaar thay
Phir unmein se har ek dusre ko malamat karne laga

t: Qaloo ya waylana inna kunna tagheena
u: Akhir ko unhon ne kaha “afsos hamare haal par, beshak hum sarkash ho gaye thay

ar: عَسَىٰ رَبُّنَآ أَن يُبۡدِلَنَا خَيۡرࣰ ا مِّنۡهَآ إِنَّآ إِلَىٰ رَبِّنَا رَٰغِبُونَ
t: AAasa rabbuna an yubdilana khayran minha inna ila rabbina raghiboona
u: Baeed (door) nahin ke hamara Rubb humein badle mein issey behtar baagh ata farmaye, hum apne Rubb ki taraf rujoo karte hain

ar: كَذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡعَذَابُۖ وَلَعَذَابُ ٱلۡأٓخِرَةِ أَكۡبَرُۚ لَوۡ كَانُواْ يَعۡلَمُونَ
t: Kathalika alAAathabu walaAAathabu alakhirati akbaru law kanoo yaAAlamoona
u: Aisa hota hai azaab aur aakhirat ka azaab issey bhi bada hai, kaash yeh log isko jaante

ar: إِنَّ لِلۡمُتَّقِينَ عِندَ رَبِّهِمۡ جَنَّٰتِ ٱلنَّعِيمِ
t: Inna lilmuttaqeena AAinda rabbihim jannati alnnaAAeemi
u: Yaqeenan khuda-tars logon ke liye unke Rubb ke yahan niyamat bhari jannatein hain
Kya hum farma-bardaaron ka haal mujreemon sa kardein
Tum logon ko kya ho gaya hai, tum kaise hukum lagate ho
Kya tumhare paas koi kitaab hai jismein tum yeh padhte ho
Ke tumhare liye zaroor wahan wahi kuch hai jo tum apne liye pasand karte ho

ar: أَمۡ لَكُمۡ أَيۡمَٰنٌ عَلَيۡنَا بَٰلِغَةٌ إِلَىٰ يَوۡمِ ٱلۡقِيَٰمَةِ إِنَّ لَكُمۡ لَمَا تَحۡكُمُونَ
t: Am lakum aymanun AAalayna balighatun ila yawmi alqiyamati inna lakum lama tahkumoona
u: Ya phir kya tumhare liye roz-e-qayamat tak humpar kuch ahad-o-paiman (covenant) sabit hai ke tumhein wahi kuch milega jiska tum hukum lagao
Inse pucho tum mein se kaun iska zaamin (gurantee/responsible) hai

ar: أَمۡ لَهُمۡ شُرَكَآءُ فَلۡيَأۡتُواْ بِشُرَكَآئِهِمۡ إِن كَانُواْ صَٰدِقِينَ
t: Am lahum shurakao falyatoo bishurakaihim in kanoo sadiqeena
u: Ya phir inke thehraye huye kuch sahreek hain (jinhon ne iska zimma liya ho)?yeh baat hai to layein apne shareekon ko agar yeh sacchey hain

ar: يَوۡمَ يُكۡشَفُ عَن سَاقࣲ وَيُدۡعَوۡنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ فَلَا يَسۡتَطِيعُونَ
t: Yawma yukshafu AAan saqin wayudAAawna ila alssujoodi fala yastateeAAoona
u: Jis roz sakht waqt aa padega aur logon ko sajda karne ke liye bulaya jayega to yeh log sajda na kar sakenge

ar: خَٰشِعَةً أَبۡصَٰرُهُمۡ تَرۡهَقُهُمۡ ذِلَّةࣱۖ وَقَدۡ كَانُواْ يُدۡعَوۡنَ إِلَى ٱلسُّجُودِ وَهُمۡ سَٰلِمُونَ
t: KhashiAAatan absaruhum tarhaquhum thillatun waqad kanoo yudAAawna ila alssujoodi wahum salimoona
u: Inki nigaahein nichey hongi, zillat inpar chaa rahi hogi. Yeh jab sahi-o-saalim thay us waqt inhein sajde ke liye (bulaya jata tha) aur yeh inkar karte thay

ar: فَذَرۡنِي وَمَن يُكَذِّبُ بِهَٰذَا ٱلۡحَدِيثِۖ سَنَسۡتَدۡرِجُهُم مِّنۡ حَيۡثُ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ
t: Fatharnee waman yukaththibu bihatha alhadeethi sanastadrijuhum min haythu la yaAAlamoona
u: Pas aey Nabi, tum is kalam ke jhutlane walon ka maamla mujhpar chodh do hum aise tarike se inko batadreej tabahi ki taraf le jayenge ke inko khabar bhi na hogi
Main inki rassi daraaz kar raha hoon, meri chaal badi zabardast hai

ar: أَمۡ تَسۡـَٔلُهُمۡ أَجۡرࣰ ا فَهُم مِّن مَّغۡرَمࣲ مُّثۡقَلُونَ
t: Am tasaluhum ajran fahum min maghramin muthqaloona
u: Kya tum insey koi ajar (compensation) talab kar rahey ho ke yeh is chatti ke bojh (feel burdened with debt) taley dabey ja rahe hoon
Kya inke paas gaib ka ilam hai jisey yeh likh rahey hon

ar: فَٱصۡبِرۡ لِحُكۡمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تَكُن كَصَاحِبِ ٱلۡحُوتِ إِذۡ نَادَىٰ وَهُوَ مَكۡظُومࣱ‏
t: Faisbir lihukmi rabbika wala takun kasahibi alhooti ith nada wahuwa makthoomun
u: Pas apne Rubb ka faisla saadir honay tak sabr karo aur machli wale (younis) ki tarah na ho jao, jab usne pukara tha aur woh gham se bhara hua tha

ar: لَّوۡلَآ أَن تَدَٰرَكَهُۥ نِعۡمَةࣱ مِّن رَّبِّهِۦ لَنُبِذَ بِٱلۡعَرَآءِ وَهُوَ مَذۡمُومࣱ‏
t: Lawla an tadarakahu niAAmatun min rabbihi lanubitha bialAAarai wahuwa mathmoomun
u: Agar uske Rubb ki meharbani uske shamil-e-haal na ho jati to woh mazmoom (disgrace) hokar chatyal maidan mein phenk diya jata
Aakhir-e-kaar uske Rubb ne usey barguzida (exalted) farma liya aur usey saleh bandon mein shamil kardiya

ar: وَإِن يَكَادُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لَيُزۡلِقُونَكَ بِأَبۡصَٰرِهِمۡ لَمَّا سَمِعُواْ ٱلذِّكۡرَ وَيَقُولُونَ إِنَّهُۥ لَمَجۡنُونࣱ‏
t: Wain yakadu allatheena kafaroo layuzliqoonaka biabsarihim lamma samiAAoo alththikra wayaqooloona innahu lamajnoonun
u: Jab yeh kafir log kalam-e-nasihat (Quran) sunte hain to tumhein aisi nazaron se dekhte hain ke goya tumhare qadam ukhaad denge, Aur kehte hain ke yeh zaroor deewana hai
Halaanke yeh to sarey jahaan walon ke liye ek naseehat hai
Honi shudhni ! (indubitable) [sach-much honay wali]
Kya hai woh honi shudni (indubitable)
Aur tum kya jaano ke woh kya hai honi shudhni (indubitable)
Samood aur Aad ne us achanak toot padne wali aafat ko jhutlaya
To Samood ek sakht haadse mein halaaq kiye gaye

ar: وَأَمَّا عَادࣱ فَأُهۡلِكُواْ بِرِيحࣲ صَرۡصَرٍ عَاتِيَةࣲ‏
t: Waamma AAadun faohlikoo bireehin sarsarin AAatiyatin
u: Aur Aad ek badi shadeed toofani aandhi(storm) se tabah kardiye gaye

ar: سَخَّرَهَا عَلَيۡهِمۡ سَبۡعَ لَيَالࣲ وَثَمَٰنِيَةَ أَيَّامٍ حُسُومࣰ اۖ فَتَرَى ٱلۡقَوۡمَ فِيهَا صَرۡعَىٰ كَأَنَّهُمۡ أَعۡجَازُ نَخۡلٍ خَاوِيَةࣲ‏
t: Sakhkharaha AAalayhim sabAAa layalin wathamaniyata ayyamin husooman fatara alqawma feeha sarAAa kaannahum aAAjazu nakhlin khawiyatun
u: Allah taala ne usko musalsal saat (seven) raat aur aath (eight) din unpar musallat rakkha (tum wahan hotey to) dekhte ke woh wahan is tarah pachade paday jaise woh khajoor ke boseeda (rotten) taney (trunks) hon
Ab kya unmein se koi tumhein baki nazar aata hai

ar: وَجَآءَ فِرۡعَوۡنُ وَمَن قَبۡلَهُۥ وَٱلۡمُؤۡتَفِكَٰتُ بِٱلۡخَاطِئَةِ
t: Wajaa firAAawnu waman qablahu waalmutafikatu bialkhatiati
u: Aur isi khata-e-azeem ka irtiqaab Firoun aur ussey pehle ke logon ne aur talpat (overturned) ho janey wali bastiyon ne kiya

ar: فَعَصَوۡاْ رَسُولَ رَبِّهِمۡ فَأَخَذَهُمۡ أَخۡذَةࣰ رَّابِيَةً
t: FaAAasaw rasoola rabbihim faakhathahum akhthatan rabiyatan
u: Un sab ne apne Rubb ke Rasool ki baat na maani to usne unko bade sakhti ke saath pakda

ar: إِنَّا لَمَّا طَغَا ٱلۡمَآءُ حَمَلۡنَٰكُمۡ فِي ٱلۡجَارِيَةِ
t: Inna lamma tagha almao hamalnakum fee aljariyati
u: Jab pani ka toofan hadd se guzar gaya to humne tumko kashti mein sawar kardiya tha

ar: لِنَجۡعَلَهَا لَكُمۡ تَذۡكِرَةࣰ وَتَعِيَهَآ أُذُنࣱ وَٰعِيَةࣱ‏
t: LinajAAalaha lakum tathkiratan wataAAiyaha othunun waAAiyatun
u: Taa-ke is waqiye ko tumhare liye ek sabaq-aamoz yaadgaar bana dein aur yaad rakhne waley kaan iski yaad mehfooz rakkhein

ar: فَإِذَا نُفِخَ فِي ٱلصُّورِ نَفۡخَةࣱ وَٰحِدَةࣱ‏
t: Faitha nufikha fee alssoori nafkhatun wahidatun
u: Phir jab ek dafa sur mein phoonk maar di jayegi

ar: وَحُمِلَتِ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ وَٱلۡجِبَالُ فَدُكَّتَا دَكَّةࣰ وَٰحِدَةࣰ‏
t: Wahumilati alardu waaljibalu fadukkata dakkatan wahidatan
u: Aur zameen aur pahadon ko utha kar ek hi chot mein reza reza kardiya jayega
Us roz woh honay wala waqiya pesh aa jayega
Usdin Aasmaan phatega aur uski bandish dhili padh jayegi

ar: وَٱلۡمَلَكُ عَلَىٰٓ أَرۡجَآئِهَاۚ وَيَحۡمِلُ عَرۡشَ رَبِّكَ فَوۡقَهُمۡ يَوۡمَئِذࣲ ثَمَٰنِيَةࣱ‏
t: Waalmalaku AAala arjaiha wayahmilu AAarsha rabbika fawqahum yawmaithin thamaniyatun
u: Farishtey uske atraf-o-jawanib mein hongey aur aat (eight) farishtey us roz tere Rubb ka arsh apne upar uthaye huey hongey

ar: يَوۡمَئِذࣲ تُعۡرَضُونَ لَا تَخۡفَىٰ مِنكُمۡ خَافِيَةࣱ‏
t: Yawmaithin tuAAradoona la takhfa minkum khafiyatun
u: Woh din hoga jab tumlog pesh kiye jaogey, tumhara koi raaz bhi chupa na reh jayega

ar: فَأَمَّا مَنۡ أُوتِيَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ بِيَمِينِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ هَآؤُمُ ٱقۡرَءُواْ كِتَٰبِيَهۡ
t: Faamma man ootiya kitabahu biyameenihi fayaqoolu haomu iqraoo kitabiyah
u: Us waqt jiska naam-e-aamal uske seedhey haath mein diya jayega woh kahega “lo dekho, padho mera naam-e-aamal
Main samajhta tha ke mujhey zaroor apna hisaab milne wala hai”
Pas woh dil pasand aish mein hoga
Aali muqaam jannat mein
Jiske phalon ke guchhey jhuke padh rahey hongey

ar: كُلُواْ وَٱشۡرَبُواْ هَنِيٓـَٔۢا بِمَآ أَسۡلَفۡتُمۡ فِي ٱلۡأَيَّامِ ٱلۡخَالِيَةِ
t: Kuloo waishraboo haneean bima aslaftum fee alayyami alkhaliyati
u: (Aise logon se kaha jayega) mazey se khao aur pio apne un aamal ke badle jo tumne guzre huey dino mein kiye hain

ar: وَأَمَّا مَنۡ أُوتِيَ كِتَٰبَهُۥ بِشِمَالِهِۦ فَيَقُولُ يَٰلَيۡتَنِي لَمۡ أُوتَ كِتَٰبِيَهۡ
t: Waamma man ootiya kitabahu bishimalihi fayaqoolu ya laytanee lam oota kitabiyah
u: Aur jiska naam-e-aamal uske bayein (left) haath mein diya jayega woh kahega “ kaash mera aamal nama mujhey na diya gaya hota
Aur main na jaanta ke mera hisaab kya hai
Kaash meri wahi maut (jo duniya mei aayi thi) faisla-kun hoti
Aaj mera maal mere kuch kaam na aaya
Mera sara iqtedaar khatam ho gaya
(hukum hoga) pakdo isey aur iski gardan mei touk daal do
Phir isey jahannum mein jhoonk do

ar: ثُمَّ فِي سِلۡسِلَةࣲ ذَرۡعُهَا سَبۡعُونَ ذِرَاعࣰ ا فَٱسۡلُكُوهُ
t: Thumma fee silsilatin tharAAuha sabAAoona thiraAAan faoslukoohu
u: Phir isko satter(seventy) haath lambi zanjeer mei jakad do

ar: إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لَا يُؤۡمِنُ بِٱللَّهِ ٱلۡعَظِيمِ
t: Innahu kana la yuminu biAllahi alAAatheemi
u: Yeh na Allah buzurg-o-bartar par iman lata tha
Aur na miskeen ko khana khilane ki targeeb deta tha
Lihaza aaj na yahan iska koi yaar-e-gamkhaar hai
Aur na zakhmon ke dhowan (washing of wounds) ke siwa iske liye koi khana
Jisey khatakaaron (sinners) ke siwa koi nahin khata
Pas nahin, main qasam khata hoon un cheezon ki bhi jo tum dekhte ho
Aur unki bhi jinhein tum nahin dekhte
Yeh ek Rasool-e-kareem ka qaul ( speech ) hai

ar: وَمَا هُوَ بِقَوۡلِ شَاعِرࣲۚ قَلِيلࣰ ا مَّا تُؤۡمِنُونَ
t: Wama huwa biqawli shaAAirin qaleelan ma tuminoona
u: Kisi shayar ka qaul nahin hai, tumlog kam hi iman latey ho

ar: وَلَا بِقَوۡلِ كَاهِنࣲۚ قَلِيلࣰ ا مَّا تَذَكَّرُونَ
t: Wala biqawli kahinin qaleelan ma tathakkaroona
u: Aur na yeh kisi kaahin(soothsayer) ka qaul hai , tum log kam hi gaur karte ho
Yeh Rabb-ul alameen ki taraf se nazil huwa hai
Aur agar is (Nabi) ne khud ghad kar koi baat hamari taraf mansook ki hoti
To hum iska dayan(right) haath padkad letay
Aur iski rag-e-gardan (life vein) kaat daalte

ar: فَمَا مِنكُم مِّنۡ أَحَدٍ عَنۡهُ حَٰجِزِينَ
t: Fama minkum min ahadin AAanhu hajizeena
u: Phir tum mein se koi (humein)is kaam se rokne wala na hota
Dar haqeeqat yeh parheizgar logon ke liye ek naseehat hai
Aur hum jante hain ke tum mein se kuch log jhutlane waley hain
Aise kafiron ke liye yaqeenan yeh mujeeb-e-hasrat (cause of regret) hai
Aur yeh bilkul yaqeeni haqq hai
Pas aey nabi, apne Rubb-e-azeem ke naam ki tasbeeh karo
Mangne waley ne azaab maanga hai (woh azaab) jo zaroor waqey honay wala hai
Kafiron ke liye hai, koi usey dafa karne wala nahin
Us khuda ki taraf se hai jo urooj ke zeeno (ascending steps)ka malik hai

ar: تَعۡرُجُ ٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ إِلَيۡهِ فِي يَوۡمࣲ كَانَ مِقۡدَارُهُۥ خَمۡسِينَ أَلۡفَ سَنَةࣲ‏
t: TaAAruju almalaikatu waalrroohu ilayhi fee yawmin kana miqdaruhu khamseena alfa sanatin
u: Malaika (angels) aur rooh(Jibrael) uske huzoor chadh kar jatey hain ek aise din mein jiski miqdar pacchas (fifty) hazar saal hai
Pas aey Nabi, sabr karo, shaista sabr
Yeh log usey dur samajhte hain
Aur hum usey qareeb dekh rahey hain
(woh azaab us roz hoga) jis roz aasman pigli huye chandi ki tarah ho jayega
Aur pahad rang-bi-rang ke dhunke huey oon (wool) jaise ho jayenge
Aur koi jigri dost apne jigri dost ko na puchega

ar: يُبَصَّرُونَهُمۡۚ يَوَدُّ ٱلۡمُجۡرِمُ لَوۡ يَفۡتَدِي مِنۡ عَذَابِ يَوۡمِئِذِۭ بِبَنِيهِ
t: Yubassaroonahum yawaddu almujrimu law yaftadee min AAathabi yawmiithin bibaneehi
u: Halaanke woh ek dusre ko dikhaye jayenge, mujrim chahega ke us din ke azaab se bachne ke liye apni aulad ko
Apni biwi ko, apne bhai ko
Apne qareeb-tareen khandaan ko jo usey panaah dene wala tha

ar: وَمَن فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ جَمِيعࣰ ا ثُمَّ يُنجِيهِ
t: Waman fee alardi jameeAAan thumma yunjeehi
u: Aur rooh-e-zameen ke sab logon ko fidiya (badle) mein dey-de aur yeh tadbeer usey nijaat dila de
Hargiz nahin woh to bhadakti hui aag ki lapat hogi
Jo gosht posht ko chaat jayegi
Pukar pukar kar apni taraf bulayegi har us shaks ko jisne haqq se mooh moda aur peet pheri
Aur maal jamaa kiya aur seint seint kar (amassed wealth) rakkha
Insan thud-dila (impatient) paida kiya gaya hai
Jab uspar museebat aati hai to ghabra uthta hai
Aur jab usey khush-haali naseeb hoti hai to bukhl (kanjoosi) karne lagta hai
Magar woh log (is aib se bache huey hai) jo namaz padne waley hain
Jo apni namaz ki hamesha pabandi karte hai
Jinke maalon mein
Saahil (maangne waley) aur mehroom ka ek haqq mukarrar hai
Jo roz-e-jaza ko barhaq maante hain

ar: وَٱلَّذِينَ هُم مِّنۡ عَذَابِ رَبِّهِم مُّشۡفِقُونَ
t: Waallatheena hum min AAathabi rabbihim mushfiqoona
u: Jo apne Rubb ke azaab se darte hain
Kyunke unke Rubb ka azaab aisi cheez nahin hai jissey koi bekhauf ho
Jo apni sharmgahon ki hifazat karte hain

ar: إِلَّا عَلَىٰٓ أَزۡوَٰجِهِمۡ أَوۡ مَا مَلَكَتۡ أَيۡمَٰنُهُمۡ فَإِنَّهُمۡ غَيۡرُ مَلُومِينَ
t: Illa AAala azwajihim aw ma malakat aymanuhum fainnahum ghayru maloomeena
u: Ba-juz apne biwiyon ya apni mamluka aurton ke jinse mehfooz na rakhne mein unpar koi malamat nahin

ar: فَمَنِ ٱبۡتَغَىٰ وَرَآءَ ذَٰلِكَ فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ هُمُ ٱلۡعَادُونَ
t: Famani ibtagha waraa thalika faolaika humu alAAadoona
u: Albatta jo iske alawa kuch aur chahein wahi hadd se tajawuz karne wala hai
Jo apne amanaton ki hifazat aur apne ahad (covenant) ka paas karte hai
Jo apni gawahiyon mein raast baazi (upright) par qayam rehte hain
Aur jo apni namaz ki hifazat karte hain
Yeh log izzat ke saath jannat ke baaghon mei rahenge
Pas aey Nabi , kya baat hai ke yeh munkirin dayein(left) aur bayein(right) se
Giroh (crowds) dar giroh(crowds) tumhari taraf daude chale aa rahe hain

ar: أَيَطۡمَعُ كُلُّ ٱمۡرِيࣲٕ مِّنۡهُمۡ أَن يُدۡخَلَ جَنَّةَ نَعِيمࣲ‏
t: AyatmaAAu kullu imriin minhum an yudkhala jannata naAAeemin
u: Kya inmein se har ek yeh lalaj rakhta hai ke woh niyamat bhari jannat mein daakhil kardiya jayega
Hargiz nahin humne jis cheez se inko paida kiya hai usey yeh khud jaante hain

ar: فَلَآ أُقۡسِمُ بِرَبِّ ٱلۡمَشَٰرِقِ وَٱلۡمَغَٰرِبِ إِنَّا لَقَٰدِرُونَ
t: Fala oqsimu birabbi almashariqi waalmagharibi inna laqadiroona
u: Pas nahin, main qasam khata hoon mashrikon aur maghribon ke maalik ki hum ispar qadir hain

ar: عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّبَدِّلَ خَيۡرࣰ ا مِّنۡهُمۡ وَمَا نَحۡنُ بِمَسۡبُوقِينَ
t: AAala an nubaddila khayran minhum wama nahnu bimasbooqeena
u: Ke inki jagah insey behtar log le aayein aur koi humse baazi le jaane wala nahin hai

ar: فَذَرۡهُمۡ يَخُوضُواْ وَيَلۡعَبُواْ حَتَّىٰ يُلَٰقُواْ يَوۡمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِي يُوعَدُونَ
t: Fatharhum yakhoodoo wayalAAaboo hatta yulaqoo yawmahumu allathee yooAAadoona
u: Lihaza inhein apni behuda baaton aur apne khel mein pada rehne do yahan tak ke yeh apne us din ko pahunch jayenge jiska insey waada kiya ja raha hai

ar: يَوۡمَ يَخۡرُجُونَ مِنَ ٱلۡأَجۡدَاثِ سِرَاعࣰ ا كَأَنَّهُمۡ إِلَىٰ نُصُبࣲ يُوفِضُونَ
t: Yawma yakhrujoona mina alajdathi siraAAan kaannahum ila nusubin yoofidoona
u: Jab yeh apni qabron se nikal kar is tarah daude ja rahey hongey jaise apne buthon (idols) ke aasthano (altars) ki taraf daud rahey hon

ar: خَٰشِعَةً أَبۡصَٰرُهُمۡ تَرۡهَقُهُمۡ ذِلَّةࣱۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡيَوۡمُ ٱلَّذِي كَانُواْ يُوعَدُونَ
t: KhashiAAatan absaruhum tarhaquhum thillatun thalika alyawmu allathee kanoo yooAAadoona
u: Inki nigahein jhuki hui hongi, zillat inpar chaa rahi hogi, woh din hai jiska insey wada kiya ja raha hai

ar: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَا نُوحًا إِلَىٰ قَوۡمِهِۦٓ أَنۡ أَنذِرۡ قَوۡمَكَ مِن قَبۡلِ أَن يَأۡتِيَهُمۡ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمࣱ‏
t: Inna arsalna noohan ila qawmihi an anthir qawmaka min qabli an yatiyahum AAathabun aleemun
u: Humne Nooh ko uski qaum ki taraf bheja (is hidayat ke saath) ke apni qaum ke logon ko khabardar karde qabl iske ke unpar ek dardnaak azaab aaye

ar: قَالَ يَٰقَوۡمِ إِنِّي لَكُمۡ نَذِيرࣱ مُّبِينٌ
t: Qala ya qawmi innee lakum natheerun mubeenun
u: Usne kaha “ Aey meri qaum ke logon, main tumhare liye ek saaf saaf khabardar kardene wala (paighambar) hoon
(Tumko aagah karta hoon) ke Allah ki bandagi karo aur ussey daro aur meri itaat (follow) karo

ar: يَغۡفِرۡ لَكُم مِّن ذُنُوبِكُمۡ وَيُؤَخِّرۡكُمۡ إِلَىٰٓ أَجَلࣲ مُّسَمًّىۚ إِنَّ أَجَلَ ٱللَّهِ إِذَا جَآءَ لَا يُؤَخَّرُۚ لَوۡ كُنتُمۡ تَعۡلَمُونَ
t: Yaghfir lakum min thunoobikum wayuakhkhirkum ila ajalin musamman inna ajala Allahi itha jaa la yuakhkharu law kuntum taAAlamoona
u: Allah tumhare gunaahon se darguzar farmayega aur tumhein ek waqt-e-mukarrar tak baaki rakkhega. Haqeeqat yeh hai ke Allah ka mukarrar kiya hua waqt jab aa jata hai to phir taala nahin jata kaash tumhein iska ilm ho

ar: قَالَ رَبِّ إِنِّي دَعَوۡتُ قَوۡمِي لَيۡلࣰ ا وَنَهَارࣰ ا
t: Qala rabbi innee daAAawtu qawmee laylan wanaharan
u: Usne arz kiya “Aey mere Rubb , maine apni qaum ke logon ko shab-o-roz (night and day) pukara

ar: فَلَمۡ يَزِدۡهُمۡ دُعَآءِيٓ إِلَّا فِرَارࣰ ا
u: Magar meri pukar ne unke farar hi mei izafa kiya

ar: وَإِنِّي كُلَّمَا دَعَوۡتُهُمۡ لِتَغۡفِرَ لَهُمۡ جَعَلُوٓاْ أَصَٰبِعَهُمۡ فِيٓ ءَاذَانِهِمۡ وَٱسۡتَغۡشَوۡاْ ثِيَابَهُمۡ وَأَصَرُّواْ وَٱسۡتَكۡبَرُواْ ٱسۡتِكۡبَارࣰ ا
t: Wainnee kullama daAAawtuhum litaghfira lahum jaAAaloo asabiAAahum fee athanihim waistaghshaw thiyabahum waasarroo waistakbaroo istikbaran
u: Aur jab bhi maine unko bulaya taa-ke tu unhein maaf karde , unhon ne kaano mein ungliyan thoos li aur apne kapdon se mooh dhaank liye aur apni rawish par adh gaye aur bada takabbur (proudness) kiya
Phir maine unko haanke pukarey (openly) ki dawat di

ar: ثُمَّ إِنِّيٓ أَعۡلَنتُ لَهُمۡ وَأَسۡرَرۡتُ لَهُمۡ إِسۡرَارࣰ ا
t: Thumma innee aAAlantu lahum waasrartu lahum israran
u: Phir maine aelaniya (publicly) bhi unko tableeg ki aur chupke chupke bhi samjhaya

ar: فَقُلۡتُ ٱسۡتَغۡفِرُواْ رَبَّكُمۡ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ غَفَّارࣰ ا
t: Faqultu istaghfiroo rabbakum innahu kana ghaffaran
u: Maine kaha apne Rubb se maafi maango,beshak woh bada maaf karne wala hai
Woh tumpar aasmaan se khoob baarishein barsayega

ar: وَيُمۡدِدۡكُم بِأَمۡوَٰلࣲ وَبَنِينَ وَيَجۡعَل لَّكُمۡ جَنَّٰتࣲ وَيَجۡعَل لَّكُمۡ أَنۡهَٰرࣰ ا
t: Wayumdidkum biamwalin wabaneena wayajAAal lakum jannatin wayajAAal lakum anharan
u: Tumhein maal aur aulad se nawaze ga, tumhare liye baagh paida karega aur tumhare liye nehrein jaari kardega

ar: مَّا لَكُمۡ لَا تَرۡجُونَ لِلَّهِ وَقَارࣰ ا
t: Ma lakum la tarjoona lillahi waqaran
u: Tumhein kya ho gaya hai ke Allah ke liye tum kisi waqar (majesty) ki tawakku nahin rakhte
Halaanke usne tarah tarah se tumhein banaya hai

ar: أَلَمۡ تَرَوۡاْ كَيۡفَ خَلَقَ ٱللَّهُ سَبۡعَ سَمَٰوَٰتࣲ طِبَاقࣰ ا
t: Alam taraw kayfa khalaqa Allahu sabAAa samawatin tibaqan
u: Kya dekhte nahin ho ke Allah ne kis tarah saat aasman teh-bar-teh banaye

ar: وَجَعَلَ ٱلۡقَمَرَ فِيهِنَّ نُورࣰ ا وَجَعَلَ ٱلشَّمۡسَ سِرَاجࣰ ا
t: WajaAAala alqamara feehinna nooran wajaAAala alshshamsa sirajan
u: Aur unmein chand ko noor aur suraj ko chiraag banaya

ar: وَٱللَّهُ أَنۢبَتَكُم مِّنَ ٱلۡأَرۡضِ نَبَاتࣰ ا
u: Aur Allah ne tumko zameen se ajeeb tarah ugaya

ar: ثُمَّ يُعِيدُكُمۡ فِيهَا وَيُخۡرِجُكُمۡ إِخۡرَاجࣰ ا
u: Phir woh tumhein isi zameen mein wapas le jayega aur issey yakayak tumko nikal khada karega

ar: وَٱللَّهُ جَعَلَ لَكُمُ ٱلۡأَرۡضَ بِسَاطࣰ ا
u: Aur Allah ne zameen ko tumhare liye farsh ki tarah bicha diya

ar: لِّتَسۡلُكُواْ مِنۡهَا سُبُلࣰ ا فِجَاجࣰ ا
u: Taa-ke tum uske andar khule raaston mein chalo

ar: قَالَ نُوحࣱ رَّبِّ إِنَّهُمۡ عَصَوۡنِي وَٱتَّبَعُواْ مَن لَّمۡ يَزِدۡهُ مَالُهُۥ وَوَلَدُهُۥٓ إِلَّا خَسَارࣰ ا
t: Qala noohun rabbi innahum AAasawnee waittabaAAoo man lam yazidhu maluhu wawaladuhu illa khasaran
u: Nooh ne kaha “mere Rubb, unhon ne meri baat radd kardi aur un (raheeson) ki pairvi ki jo maal aur aulad paa kar aur zyada na murad ho gaye hain
In logon ne bada bhaari makr (plot) ka jaal phaila rakkha hai

ar: وَقَالُواْ لَا تَذَرُنَّ ءَالِهَتَكُمۡ وَلَا تَذَرُنَّ وَدࣰّ ا وَلَا سُوَاعࣰ ا وَلَا يَغُوثَ وَيَعُوقَ وَنَسۡرࣰ ا
t: Waqaloo la tatharunna alihatakum wala tatharunna waddan wala suwaAAan wala yaghootha wayaAAooqa wanasran
u: Inhon ne kaha hargiz na chodo apne maboodon (deities) ko, aur na chodo Wadd aur Suwa ko aur na Yagus aur Yaook aur Nasr ko (idol names)

ar: وَقَدۡ أَضَلُّواْ كَثِيرࣰ اۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا ضَلَٰلࣰ ا
t: Waqad adalloo katheeran wala tazidi alththalimeena illa dalalan
u: Inhon ne bahut logon ko gumraah kiya hai, aur tu bhi in zalimon ko gumrahi ke siwa kisi cheez mein tarakki na de

ar: مِّمَّا خَطِيٓـَٰٔتِهِمۡ أُغۡرِقُواْ فَأُدۡخِلُواْ نَارࣰ ا فَلَمۡ يَجِدُواْ لَهُم مِّن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ أَنصَارࣰ ا
t: Mimma khateeatihim oghriqoo faodkhiloo naran falam yajidoo lahum min dooni Allahi ansaran
u: Apni khataon ki bina par hi woh garq(drown) kiye gaye aur Aag mein jhoonk diye gaye , phir unhon ne apne liye Allah se bachane wala koi madadgar na paya

ar: وَقَالَ نُوحࣱ رَّبِّ لَا تَذَرۡ عَلَى ٱلۡأَرۡضِ مِنَ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ دَيَّارًا
t: Waqala noohun rabbi la tathar AAala alardi mina alkafireena dayyaran
u: Aur Nooh ne kaha “Mere Rubb, In kafiron mein se koi zameen par basne wala na chodh

ar: إِنَّكَ إِن تَذَرۡهُمۡ يُضِلُّواْ عِبَادَكَ وَلَا يَلِدُوٓاْ إِلَّا فَاجِرࣰ ا كَفَّارࣰ ا
t: Innaka in tatharhum yudilloo AAibadaka wala yalidoo illa fajiran kaffaran
u: Agar tu ne inko chodh diya to yeh tere bandon ko gumraah karenge aur inki nasal se jo bhi paida hoga badkar aur sakht kafir hi hoga

ar: رَّبِّ ٱغۡفِرۡ لِي وَلِوَٰلِدَيَّ وَلِمَن دَخَلَ بَيۡتِيَ مُؤۡمِنࣰ ا وَلِلۡمُؤۡمِنِينَ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنَٰتِۖ وَلَا تَزِدِ ٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ إِلَّا تَبَارَۢا
t: Rabbi ighfir lee waliwalidayya waliman dakhala baytiya muminan walilmumineena waalmuminati wala tazidi alththalimeena illa tabaran
u: Mere Rubb, mujhey aur mere waldain ko aur har us shaks ko jo mere ghar mein momin ki haisiyat se dakhil hua hai, Aur sab momin mardon aur auraton ko maaf farma de, Aur zalimon ke liye halakat ke siwa kisi cheez mein izafa na kar

ar: قُلۡ أُوحِيَ إِلَيَّ أَنَّهُ ٱسۡتَمَعَ نَفَرࣱ مِّنَ ٱلۡجِنِّ فَقَالُوٓاْ إِنَّا سَمِعۡنَا قُرۡءَانًا عَجَبࣰ ا
t: Qul oohiya ilayya annahu istamaAAa nafarun mina aljinni faqaloo inna samiAAna quranan AAajaban
u: Aey Nabi, kaho, meri taraf wahee (revelation) bheji gayi hai ke Jinno ke ek giroh (group) ne gaur se suna phir (jaa kar apne qaum ke logon se) kaha: “humne ek bada hi ajeeb Quran suna hai

ar: يَهۡدِيٓ إِلَى ٱلرُّشۡدِ فَـَٔامَنَّا بِهِۦۖ وَلَن نُّشۡرِكَ بِرَبِّنَآ أَحَدࣰ ا
t: Yahdee ila alrrushdi faamanna bihi walan nushrika birabbina ahadan
u: Jo raah-e-raast ki taraf rehnumayi karta hai is liye hum uspar iman le aaye hain aur ab hum hargiz apne Rubb ke saath kisi ko sharik nahin karenge

ar: وَأَنَّهُۥ تَعَٰلَىٰ جَدُّ رَبِّنَا مَا ٱتَّخَذَ صَٰحِبَةࣰ وَلَا وَلَدࣰ ا
t: Waannahu taAAala jaddu rabbina ma ittakhatha sahibatan wala waladan
u: Aur yeh ke hamare Rubb ki shaan bahut aala-o-Arfa hai , usne kisi ko biwi ya beta nahin banaya

ar: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ يَقُولُ سَفِيهُنَا عَلَى ٱللَّهِ شَطَطࣰ ا
t: Waannahu kana yaqoolu safeehuna AAala Allahi shatatan
u: Aur yeh ke hamare nadaan log Allah ke barey mein bahut khilaf-e-haqq baatein karte rahey hain

ar: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن تَقُولَ ٱلۡإِنسُ وَٱلۡجِنُّ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ كَذِبࣰ ا
t: Waanna thananna an lan taqoola alinsu waaljinnu AAala Allahi kathiban
u: Aur yeh ke humne samjha tha ke insaan aur jinn kabhi khuda ke baarey mein jhoot nahin bol sakte

ar: وَأَنَّهُۥ كَانَ رِجَالࣱ مِّنَ ٱلۡإِنسِ يَعُوذُونَ بِرِجَالࣲ مِّنَ ٱلۡجِنِّ فَزَادُوهُمۡ رَهَقࣰ ا
t: Waannahu kana rijalun mina alinsi yaAAoothoona birijalin mina aljinni fazadoohum rahaqan
u: Aur yeh ke Insano mein se kuch log Jinno mein se kuch logon ki panaah (refuge) maanga karte thay, is tarah unhon ne Jinno ka guroor aur zyada badha diya

ar: وَأَنَّهُمۡ ظَنُّواْ كَمَا ظَنَنتُمۡ أَن لَّن يَبۡعَثَ ٱللَّهُ أَحَدࣰ ا
t: Waannahum thannoo kama thanantum an lan yabAAatha Allahu ahadan
u: Aur yeh ke insaano ne bhi wahi gumaan kiya jaisa tumhara gumaan tha ke Allah kisi ko Rasool bana kar na bhejega

ar: وَأَنَّا لَمَسۡنَا ٱلسَّمَآءَ فَوَجَدۡنَٰهَا مُلِئَتۡ حَرَسࣰ ا شَدِيدࣰ ا وَشُهُبࣰ ا
t: Waanna lamasna alssamaa fawajadnaha muliat harasan shadeedan washuhuban
u: Aur yeh ke humne aasman ko tatola to dekha ke woh pehray-daaron (terrible guards) se patha pada hai aur shahabon (shooting meteors) ki baarish ho rahi hai

ar: وَأَنَّا كُنَّا نَقۡعُدُ مِنۡهَا مَقَٰعِدَ لِلسَّمۡعِۖ فَمَن يَسۡتَمِعِ ٱلۡأٓنَ يَجِدۡ لَهُۥ شِهَابࣰ ا رَّصَدࣰ ا
t: Waanna kunna naqAAudu minha maqaAAida lilssamAAi faman yastamiAAi alana yajid lahu shihaban rasadan
u: Aur yeh ke pehle hum sun-gun lene ke liye aasman mei baithnay ki jagah paa lete thay, magar ab jo chori chupey sunne ke koshish karta hai woh apne liye ghaat mein ek shahabe saaqib (shooting meteors) laga hua paata hai

ar: وَأَنَّا لَا نَدۡرِيٓ أَشَرٌّ أُرِيدَ بِمَن فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ أَمۡ أَرَادَ بِهِمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ رَشَدࣰ ا
t: Waanna la nadree asharrun oreeda biman fee alardi am arada bihim rabbuhum rashadan
u: Aur yeh ke hamari samajh mein na aata tha ke aaya zameen walon ke saath koi bura maamla karne ka irada kiya gaya hai ya unka Rubb unhein raah-e-raast dikhana chahta hai

ar: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلصَّٰلِحُونَ وَمِنَّا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَۖ كُنَّا طَرَآئِقَ قِدَدࣰ ا
t: Waanna minna alssalihoona waminna doona thalika kunna taraiqa qidadan
u: Aur yeh ke hum mein se kuch log saleh (upright) hain aur kuch is se farotar hain, hum mukhtalif tareeqon (ways/factions) mein batey (divided) huey hain

ar: وَأَنَّا ظَنَنَّآ أَن لَّن نُّعۡجِزَ ٱللَّهَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَلَن نُّعۡجِزَهُۥ هَرَبࣰ ا
t: Wanna thananna an lan nuAAjiza Allaha fee alardi walan nuAAjizahu haraban
u: Auy yeh ke hum samajhte thay ke na zameen mein hum Allah ko aajiz (frustrate) kar sakte hain aur na bhaag kar usey hara saktey hain

ar: وَأَنَّا لَمَّا سَمِعۡنَا ٱلۡهُدَىٰٓ ءَامَنَّا بِهِۦۖ فَمَن يُؤۡمِنۢ بِرَبِّهِۦ فَلَا يَخَافُ بَخۡسࣰ ا وَلَا رَهَقࣰ ا
t: Waanna lamma samiAAna alhuda amanna bihi faman yumin birabbihi fala yakhafu bakhsan wala rahaqan
u: Aur yeh ke humne jab hidayat ki taleem suni to hum uspar iman le aaye ab jo koi bhi apne Rubb par iman le aayega usey kisi haq-talfi ya zulm ka khauff na hoga

ar: وَأَنَّا مِنَّا ٱلۡمُسۡلِمُونَ وَمِنَّا ٱلۡقَٰسِطُونَۖ فَمَنۡ أَسۡلَمَ فَأُوْلَٰٓئِكَ تَحَرَّوۡاْ رَشَدࣰ ا
t: Waanna minna almuslimoona waminna alqasitoona faman aslama faolaika taharraw rashadan
u: Aur yeh ke hum mein se kuch muslim(Allah ke itaat guzar) hain aur kuch haqq se munharif (upright) to jinhon ne Islam (itaat ka raasta) ikhtiyar kar liya unhon ne najaat ki raah dhoond li

ar: وَأَمَّا ٱلۡقَٰسِطُونَ فَكَانُواْ لِجَهَنَّمَ حَطَبࣰ ا
u: Aur jo haqq se muhnarif hai woh jahannum ka indhan (fuel) banney wala hai

ar: وَأَلَّوِ ٱسۡتَقَٰمُواْ عَلَى ٱلطَّرِيقَةِ لَأَسۡقَيۡنَٰهُم مَّآءً غَدَقࣰ ا
t: Waallawi istaqamoo AAala alttareeqati laasqaynahum maan ghadaqan
u: Aur (aey Nabi kaho mujhpar yeh wahee bhi ki gayi hai ke) log agar raah-e-raast par sabit qadami (firmly) se chalte to hum unhein khoob sairaab karte (provide abundant rain)

ar: لِّنَفۡتِنَهُمۡ فِيهِۚ وَمَن يُعۡرِضۡ عَن ذِكۡرِ رَبِّهِۦ يَسۡلُكۡهُ عَذَابࣰ ا صَعَدࣰ ا
t: Linaftinahum feehi waman yuAArid AAan thikri rabbihi yaslukhu AAathaban saAAadan
u: Taa-ke is niyamat se unki aazmaish karein aur jo apne Rubb ke zikr se mooh modega uska Rubb usey sakht azaab mein mubtala kardega

ar: وَأَنَّ ٱلۡمَسَٰجِدَ لِلَّهِ فَلَا تَدۡعُواْ مَعَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدࣰ ا
t: Waanna almasajida lillahi fala tadAAoo maAAa Allahi ahadan
u: Aur yeh ke masjidein Allah ke liye hai, lihaza unmein Allah ke saath kisi aur ko na pukaro

ar: وَأَنَّهُۥ لَمَّا قَامَ عَبۡدُ ٱللَّهِ يَدۡعُوهُ كَادُواْ يَكُونُونَ عَلَيۡهِ لِبَدࣰ ا
t: Waannahu lamma qama AAabdu Allahi yadAAoohu kadoo yakoonoona AAalayhi libadan
u: Aur yeh ke jab Allah ka banda usko pukarne ke liye khada hua to log uspar toot padne ke liye tayyar ho gaye

ar: قُلۡ إِنَّمَآ أَدۡعُواْ رَبِّي وَلَآ أُشۡرِكُ بِهِۦٓ أَحَدࣰ ا
t: Qul innama adAAoo rabbee wala oshriku bihi ahadan
u: Aey Nabi ,kaho ke main to apne Rubb ko pukarta hoon aur uske saath kisi ko sharik nahin karta

ar: قُلۡ إِنِّي لَآ أَمۡلِكُ لَكُمۡ ضَرࣰّ ا وَلَا رَشَدࣰ ا
t: Qul innee la amliku lakum darran wala rashadan
u: Kaho main tum logon keliye na kisi nuksan ka ikhtiyar rakhta hoon na kisi bhalayi ka

ar: قُلۡ إِنِّي لَن يُجِيرَنِي مِنَ ٱللَّهِ أَحَدࣱ وَلَنۡ أَجِدَ مِن دُونِهِۦ مُلۡتَحَدًا
t: Qul innee lan yujeeranee mina Allahi ahadun walan ajida min doonihi multahadan
u: Kaho mujhey Allah ki giraft se koi nahin bacha sakta aur na main uske daaman ke siwa koi jaye panaah (refuge) paa sakta hoon

ar: إِلَّا بَلَٰغࣰ ا مِّنَ ٱللَّهِ وَرِسَٰلَٰتِهِۦۚ وَمَن يَعۡصِ ٱللَّهَ وَرَسُولَهُۥ فَإِنَّ لَهُۥ نَارَ جَهَنَّمَ خَٰلِدِينَ فِيهَآ أَبَدًا
t: Illa balaghan mina Allahi warisalatihi waman yaAAsi Allaha warasoolahu fainna lahu nara jahannama khalideena feeha abadan
u: Mera kaam iske siwa kuch nahin hai ke Allah ki baat aur uske paighamaat pahuncha doon. Ab jo bhi Allah aur uske Rasool ki baat na maanega uske liye jahannum ki aag hai aur aisey log usmein hamesha rahenge

ar: حَتَّىٰٓ إِذَا رَأَوۡاْ مَا يُوعَدُونَ فَسَيَعۡلَمُونَ مَنۡ أَضۡعَفُ نَاصِرࣰ ا وَأَقَلُّ عَدَدࣰ ا
t: Hatta itha raaw ma yooAAadoona fasayaAAlamoona man adAAafu nasiran waaqallu AAadadan
u: (Yeh log apni is rawish se baaz na aayenge) yahan tak ke jab us cheez ko dekh lenge jiska inse waada kiya ja raha hai to inhein maloom ho jayega ke kiske madadgaar kamzoar hain aur kiska jattha (group) taadad mein kam hai

ar: قُلۡ إِنۡ أَدۡرِيٓ أَقَرِيبࣱ مَّا تُوعَدُونَ أَمۡ يَجۡعَلُ لَهُۥ رَبِّيٓ أَمَدًا
t: Qul in adree aqareebun ma tooAAadoona am yajAAalu lahu rabbee amadan
u: Kaho, main nahin jaanta ke jis cheez ka waada tumse kiya ja raha hai woh qareeb hai ya mera Rubb uske liye koi lambi muddat muqarrar famata hai

ar: عَٰلِمُ ٱلۡغَيۡبِ فَلَا يُظۡهِرُ عَلَىٰ غَيۡبِهِۦٓ أَحَدًا
t: AAalimu alghaybi fala yuthhiru AAala ghaybihi ahadan
u: Woh aalimul gaib hai , apne gaib par kisi ko muttala (reveal/disclose) nahin karta

ar: إِلَّا مَنِ ٱرۡتَضَىٰ مِن رَّسُولࣲ فَإِنَّهُۥ يَسۡلُكُ مِنۢ بَيۡنِ يَدَيۡهِ وَمِنۡ خَلۡفِهِۦ رَصَدࣰ ا
t: Illa mani irtada min rasoolin fainnahu yasluku min bayni yadayhi wamin khalfihi rasadan
u: Siwai us Rasool ke jisey usne (gaib ka koi ilm dene ke liye) pasand karliya ho, to uske aagey aur pichey woh muhafiz (guards) laga deta hai

ar: لِّيَعۡلَمَ أَن قَدۡ أَبۡلَغُواْ رِسَٰلَٰتِ رَبِّهِمۡ وَأَحَاطَ بِمَا لَدَيۡهِمۡ وَأَحۡصَىٰ كُلَّ شَيۡءٍ عَدَدَۢا
t: LiyaAAlama an qad ablaghoo risalati rabbihim waahata bima ladayhim waahsa kulla shayin AAadadan
u: Taa-ke woh jaan le ke unhon ne apne Rubb ke paighamaat pahuncha diye, aur woh unke poorey maahol ka ihata (encompass) kiye huey hai aur ek ek cheez ko usne gin rakkha hai
Aey oad lapet kar (enwrapped ) sone waley
Raat ko namaz mein khade raha karo magar kam
Aadhi Raat

ar: أَوۡ زِدۡ عَلَيۡهِ وَرَتِّلِ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ تَرۡتِيلًا
t: Aw zid AAalayhi warattili alqurana tarteelan
u: Ya issey kuch kam karlo ya issey kuch zyada badha do, aur Quran ko khoob tehar tehar kar padho

ar: إِنَّا سَنُلۡقِي عَلَيۡكَ قَوۡلࣰ ا ثَقِيلًا
u: Hum tumpar ek bhari kalam nazil karne waley hain

ar: إِنَّ نَاشِئَةَ ٱلَّيۡلِ هِيَ أَشَدُّ وَطۡـࣰٔ ا وَأَقۡوَمُ قِيلًا
t: Inna nashiata allayli hiya ashaddu watan waaqwamu qeelan
u: Dar haqeeqat raat ka uthna nafs par qaabu paney ke liye bahut kaargar aur Quran theek padhne ke liye zyada mauzu (suitable) hai

ar: إِنَّ لَكَ فِي ٱلنَّهَارِ سَبۡحࣰ ا طَوِيلࣰ ا
t: Inna laka fee alnnahari sabhan taweelan
u: Din ke auqat mein to tumhare liye bahut masrufiyat (prolonged occupation) hai

ar: وَٱذۡكُرِ ٱسۡمَ رَبِّكَ وَتَبَتَّلۡ إِلَيۡهِ تَبۡتِيلࣰ ا
t: Waothkuri isma rabbika watabattal ilayhi tabteelan
u: Apne Rubb ke naam ka zikr kiya karo aur sabse katt kar usi ke ho raho

ar: رَّبُّ ٱلۡمَشۡرِقِ وَٱلۡمَغۡرِبِ لَآ إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ فَٱتَّخِذۡهُ وَكِيلࣰ ا
t: Rabbu almashriqi waalmaghribi la ilaha illa huwa faittakhithhu wakeelan
u: Woo mashrik (east) o magrib (west) ka maalik hai, uske siwa koi khuda nahin hai, lihaza usi ko apna wakeel bana lo

ar: وَٱصۡبِرۡ عَلَىٰ مَا يَقُولُونَ وَٱهۡجُرۡهُمۡ هَجۡرࣰ ا جَمِيلࣰ ا
t: Waisbir AAala ma yaqooloona waohjurhum hajran jameelan
u: Aur jo baatein log bana rahey hain unpar sabr karo aur sharafat ke saath unse alag ho jao

ar: وَذَرۡنِي وَٱلۡمُكَذِّبِينَ أُوْلِي ٱلنَّعۡمَةِ وَمَهِّلۡهُمۡ قَلِيلًا
t: Watharnee waalmukaththibeena olee alnnaAAmati wamahhilhum qaleelan
u: In jhutlane waley khush haal logon se nimatne ka kaam tum mujhpar chodh do aur inhein zara kuch dair isi halat par rehne do

ar: إِنَّ لَدَيۡنَآ أَنكَالࣰ ا وَجَحِيمࣰ ا
u: Hamarey paas (inke liye) bhaari bediyan hain aur bhadakti hui aag

ar: وَطَعَامࣰ ا ذَا غُصَّةࣲ وَعَذَابًا أَلِيمࣰ ا
u: Aur halaq(throat) mein phasne wala khana aur dard-naak azaab

ar: يَوۡمَ تَرۡجُفُ ٱلۡأَرۡضُ وَٱلۡجِبَالُ وَكَانَتِ ٱلۡجِبَالُ كَثِيبࣰ ا مَّهِيلًا
t: Yawma tarjufu alardu waaljibalu wakanati aljibalu katheeban maheelan
u: Yeh us din hoga jab zameen aur pahad laraz uthengey aur pahadon ka haal aisa ho jaeyga jaise reit (sand) ke dhair hai jo bhikhre ja rahe hain

ar: إِنَّآ أَرۡسَلۡنَآ إِلَيۡكُمۡ رَسُولࣰ ا شَٰهِدًا عَلَيۡكُمۡ كَمَآ أَرۡسَلۡنَآ إِلَىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنَ رَسُولࣰ ا
t: Inna arsalna ilaykum rasoolan shahidan AAalaykum kama arsalna ila firAAawna rasoolan
u: Tum logon ke paas humne usi tarah ek rasool tum par gawah bana kar bheja hai jis tarah humne Firaun ki taraf ek rasool bheja tha

ar: فَعَصَىٰ فِرۡعَوۡنُ ٱلرَّسُولَ فَأَخَذۡنَٰهُ أَخۡذࣰ ا وَبِيلࣰ ا
t: FaAAasa firAAawnu alrrasoola faakhathnahu akhthan wabeelan
u: (Phir dekhlo ke jab ) Firaun ne us Rasool ki baat na maani to humne usko badi sakhti kay saath pakad liya

ar: فَكَيۡفَ تَتَّقُونَ إِن كَفَرۡتُمۡ يَوۡمࣰ ا يَجۡعَلُ ٱلۡوِلۡدَٰنَ شِيبًا
t: Fakayfa tattaqoona in kafartum yawman yajAAalu alwildana sheeban
u: Agar tum maan-ne se inkar karoge to us din kaisey bach jaogey jo bacchon ko boodha kardega

ar: ٱلسَّمَآءُ مُنفَطِرُۢ بِهِۦۚ كَانَ وَعۡدُهُۥ مَفۡعُولًا
t: Alssamao munfatirun bihi kana waAAduhu mafAAoolan
u: Aur jiski sakhti se aasman phata ja raha hoga?Allah ka wada to poora hokar hi rehna hai

ar: إِنَّ هَٰذِهِۦ تَذۡكِرَةࣱۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلًا
t: Inna hathihi tathkiratun faman shaa ittakhatha ila rabbihi sabeelan
u: Yeh ek nasihat hai , ab jiska jee chahey apne Rubb ki taraf janey ka rasta ikhtiyar karle

ar: ۞إِنَّ رَبَّكَ يَعۡلَمُ أَنَّكَ تَقُومُ أَدۡنَىٰ مِن ثُلُثَيِ ٱلَّيۡلِ وَنِصۡفَهُۥ وَثُلُثَهُۥ وَطَآئِفَةࣱ مِّنَ ٱلَّذِينَ مَعَكَۚ وَٱللَّهُ يُقَدِّرُ ٱلَّيۡلَ وَٱلنَّهَارَۚ عَلِمَ أَن لَّن تُحۡصُوهُ فَتَابَ عَلَيۡكُمۡۖ فَٱقۡرَءُواْ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنَ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانِۚ عَلِمَ أَن سَيَكُونُ مِنكُم مَّرۡضَىٰ وَءَاخَرُونَ يَضۡرِبُونَ فِي ٱلۡأَرۡضِ يَبۡتَغُونَ مِن فَضۡلِ ٱللَّهِ وَءَاخَرُونَ يُقَٰتِلُونَ فِي سَبِيلِ ٱللَّهِۖ فَٱقۡرَءُواْ مَا تَيَسَّرَ مِنۡهُۚ وَأَقِيمُواْ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُواْ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَأَقۡرِضُواْ ٱللَّهَ قَرۡضًا حَسَنࣰ اۚ وَمَا تُقَدِّمُواْ لِأَنفُسِكُم مِّنۡ خَيۡرࣲ تَجِدُوهُ عِندَ ٱللَّهِ هُوَ خَيۡرࣰ ا وَأَعۡظَمَ أَجۡرࣰ اۚ وَٱسۡتَغۡفِرُواْ ٱللَّهَۖ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ غَفُورࣱ رَّحِيمُۢ
t: Inna rabbaka yaAAlamu annaka taqoomu adna min thuluthayi allayli wanisfahu wathuluthahu wataifatun mina allatheena maAAaka waAllahu yuqaddiru allayla waalnnahara AAalima an lan tuhsoohu fataba AAalaykum faiqraoo ma tayassara mina alqurani AAalima an sayakoonu minkum marda waakharoona yadriboona fee alardi yabtaghoona min fadli Allahi waakharoona yuqatiloona fee sabeeli Allahi faiqraoo ma tayassara minhu waaqeemoo alssalata waatoo alzzakata waaqridoo Allaha qardan hasanan wama tuqaddimoo lianfusikum min khayrin tajidoohu AAinda Allahi huwa khayran waaAAthama ajran waistaghfiroo Allaha inna Allaha ghafoorun raheemun
u: Aey Nabi, tumhara Rubb janta hai ke tum kabhi do tihayi (two-third) raat ke qareeb aur kabhi aadhi raat aur kabhi ek tihayi (one-third) raat ibadat mein khade rehtey ho,Aur tumhare saathiyon mein se bhi ek giroh yeh amal karta hai, Allah hi raat aur din ke auqat ka hisab rakhta hai. Usey maloom hai ke tumlog auqat ka theek shumar nahin kar sakte, lihaza usne tumpar meharbani farmayi, Ab jitna Quran aasani se padh sakte ho padh liya karo. Usey maloom hai ke tum mein kuch mareez hongey, kuch dusre log Allah ke fazal(bounty) ki talash mein safar karte hain, Aur kuch aur log Allah ki raah mein jung karte hain, pas jitna Quran ba aasani padha ja sakey padh liya karo, namaz qayam karo, zakaat do aur Allah ko accha qarz dete raho, jo kuch bhalayi tum apne liye aagey bhejoge usey Allah ke yahan maujood paogey, wahi zyada behtar hai aur uska ajr bahut bada hai. Allah se magfirat maangte raho, beshak Allah bada Gafoor o Raheem hai
Aey oad lapeit (enveloped) kar laitney waley
Utho aur khabardar karo
Aur apne Rubb ki badayi ka elan karo
Aur apne kapde paak rakho
Aur gandagi se dur raho
Aur ehsan na karo zyada hasil karne keliye
Aur apne Rubb ki khatir sabr karo
Accha jab soor mein phook maari jayegi
Woh din bada hi sakht din hoga
Kafiron ke liye halka na hoga
Chodh do mujhey aur us shaks ko jisey maine akela paida kiya hai

ar: وَجَعَلۡتُ لَهُۥ مَالࣰ ا مَّمۡدُودࣰ ا
u: Bahut sa maal usko diya
Uske saath hazir rehne waley bete diye
Aur uske liye riyasat ki raah hamwaar ki
Phir woh tama (greedily desire) rakhta hai ke main usey aur zyada doon

ar: كَلَّآۖ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لِأٓيَٰتِنَا عَنِيدࣰ ا
u: Hargiz nahin woh hamari ayaat se inaath(stubbornly oppose) rakhta hai
Main to usey ankareeb ek kathin chadhai chadwaunga
Usne socha aur kuch baat banane ki koshish ki
To khuda ki maar uspar, kaisi baat banane ki koshish ki
Haan, khuda ki maar uspar , kaisi baat banane ki koshish ki
Phir(logon ki taraf) dekha
Phir peshani sukedi aur mooh banaya
Phir palta aur takabbur mein padh gaya

ar: فَقَالَ إِنۡ هَٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحۡرࣱ يُؤۡثَرُ
t: Faqala in hatha illa sihrun yutharu
u: Aakhir e kaar bola ke yeh kuch nahin hai magar ek jaadu jo pehle se chala aa raha hai
Yeh to ek Insani kalaam hai
Anqareeb main usey dozakh mei jhonk dunga
Aur tum kya jaano ke kya hai woh dozakh
Na baqi rakhey na chodey
Khaal(skin) jhulas dene wali
Unnis (ninteen) karkoon uspar muqarrar hain

ar: وَمَا جَعَلۡنَآ أَصۡحَٰبَ ٱلنَّارِ إِلَّا مَلَٰٓئِكَةࣰۖ وَمَا جَعَلۡنَا عِدَّتَهُمۡ إِلَّا فِتۡنَةࣰ لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لِيَسۡتَيۡقِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ وَيَزۡدَادَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ إِيمَٰنࣰ ا وَلَا يَرۡتَابَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلۡكِتَٰبَ وَٱلۡمُؤۡمِنُونَ وَلِيَقُولَ ٱلَّذِينَ فِي قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضࣱ وَٱلۡكَٰفِرُونَ مَاذَآ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَٰذَا مَثَلࣰ اۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُضِلُّ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَهۡدِي مَن يَشَآءُۚ وَمَا يَعۡلَمُ جُنُودَ رَبِّكَ إِلَّا هُوَۚ وَمَا هِيَ إِلَّا ذِكۡرَىٰ لِلۡبَشَرِ
t: Wama jaAAalna ashaba alnnari illa malaikatan wama jaAAalna AAiddatahum illa fitnatan lillatheena kafaroo liyastayqina allatheena ootoo alkitaba wayazdada allatheena amanoo eemanan wala yartaba allatheena ootoo alkitaba waalmuminoona waliyaqoola allatheena fee quloobihim maradun waalkafiroona matha arada Allahu bihatha mathalan kathalika yudillu Allahu man yashao wayahdee man yashao wama yaAAlamu junooda rabbika illa huwa wama hiya illa thikra lilbashari
u: Humne dozakh ke yeh karkoon farishtey banaye hain,aur unki tadaad ko kafiron ke liye fitna bana diya hai, taa-ke ehle kitaab ko yaqeen aa jaye aur iman laney walon ka iman badhey,Aur ehle kitaab aur momineen kisi shakk mein na rahey,aur dil ke bimar aur kuffar yeh kahein ke bhala Allah ka is ajeeb baat se kya matlab ho sakta hai. Is tarah Allah jisey chahta hai gumraah kardeta hai aur jisey chahta hai hidayat baksh deta hai aur tere Rubb ke lashkaron (soldiers) ko khud uske siwa koi nahin janta, aur is dozak ka zikr iske siwa kisi garz ke liye nahin kiya gaya hai ke logon ko issey naseehat ho
Hargiz nahin,kasam hai Chand ki
Aur Raat ki jabke woh palat-ti hai
Aur subah ki jabke woh roshan hoti hai
Yeh dozakh bhi badi cheezon mein se ek hai
Insano ke liye darawa

ar: لِمَن شَآءَ مِنكُمۡ أَن يَتَقَدَّمَ أَوۡ يَتَأَخَّرَ
t: Liman shaa minkum an yataqaddama aw yataakhkhara
u: Tum mein se har us shaks ke liye darawa jo aagey badhna chahey ya pichey reh jana chahey
Har mutanaffis, apne kasb ke badle rehan hai (hostage to one’s deeds)
Dayein bazu walon ke siwa
Jo jannaton mein hongey, wahan woh
Mujrimon se puchenge
Tumhein kya cheez dozakh mein le gayi
woh kahenge “hum namaz padne walon mein se na thay
Aur miskeen ko khana nahin khilate thay
Aur haqq ke khilaf batein banane walon ke saath milkar hum bhi batein banane lagte thay
Aur roz-e-jaza ko jhoot karar dete thay
Yahan tak ke humein us yaqeeni cheez se saabqa pesh aa gaya”
Us waqt sifarish karne walon ki sifarish unke kisi kaam na ayegi
Aakhir in logon ko kya ho gaya hai ke yeh is nasihat se mooh moad rahey hain
Goya yeh jungli gadhey hain
Jo Sher se darr kar bhaag padey hain

ar: بَلۡ يُرِيدُ كُلُّ ٱمۡرِيࣲٕ مِّنۡهُمۡ أَن يُؤۡتَىٰ صُحُفࣰ ا مُّنَشَّرَةࣰ‏
t: Bal yureedu kullu imriin minhum an yuta suhufan munashsharatan
u: Balke inmein se to har ek yeh chahta hai ke uske naam khule khat (scroll/scripture) bhejey jaye
Hargiz nahin, Asal baat yeh hai ke yeh aakhirat ka khauf nahin rakhtey
Hargiz nahin,yeh to ek nasihat hai
Ab jiska jee chahey issey sabaq hasil karle

ar: وَمَا يَذۡكُرُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُۚ هُوَ أَهۡلُ ٱلتَّقۡوَىٰ وَأَهۡلُ ٱلۡمَغۡفِرَةِ
t: Wama yathkuroona illa an yashaa Allahu huwa ahlu alttaqwa waahlu almaghfirati
u: Aur yeh koi sabaq hasil na karengey illa yeh ke Allah hi aisa chahey woh iska haqdar hai ke ussey taqwa kiya jaye aur woh iska ehal hai ke (taqwa karne walon ko) baksh de
Nahin main kasam khata hoon qayamat ke din ki
Aur nahin,main kasam khata hoon malamat karne wale nafs ki
Kya Insan yeh samajh raha hai ke hum uski haddiyon ko jama na kar sakengey

ar: بَلَىٰ قَٰدِرِينَ عَلَىٰٓ أَن نُّسَوِّيَ بَنَانَهُۥ
t: Bala qadireena AAala an nusawwiya bananahu
u: Kyun nahin? Hum to uski ungliyon ke por por tak theek bana dene par qadir hain
Magar Insan chahta yeh hai ke aagey bhi badh-aamaliyan karta rahey
“Puchta hai” aakhir kab aana hai woh qayamat ka din
Phir jab dedhey pathra jayengey (sight is dazed)
Aur chand be-noor ho jayega
Aur Chand Suraj mila kar ek kardiya jayenge
Us waqt yahi Insan kahega kahan bhaag kar jaun
Hargiz nahin,wahan koi jaye panaah na hogi
Us roz terey Rubb hi ke samney jaakar theharna hoga

ar: يُنَبَّؤُاْ ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ يَوۡمَئِذِۭ بِمَا قَدَّمَ وَأَخَّرَ
t: Yunabbao alinsanu yawmaithin bima qaddama waakhkhara
u: Us roz Insan ko uska sab agla pichla kiya karaya bata diya jayega
Balke Insan khud hi apne aap ko khoob janta hai
Chahey woh kitni hi maazratein (excuses) karey

ar: لَا تُحَرِّكۡ بِهِۦ لِسَانَكَ لِتَعۡجَلَ بِهِۦٓ
t: La tuharrik bihi lisanaka litaAAjala bihi
u: Aey Nabi , Is wahi ko jaldi jaldi yaad karne ke liye apni zubaan ko harkat na do
Isko yaad kara dena aur padhwa dena hamare zimmey hai
Lihaza jab hum isey padh rahey hon us waqt tum iske qirat ko gaur se sunte raho
Phir iska matlab samjha dena bhi hamarey zimmey hai
Hargiz nahin, asal baat yeh hai ke tum log jaldi haasil honay wali cheez (yani duniya) se muhabbat rakhte ho
Aur aakhirat ko chodh dete ho
Us roz kuch chehrey tar-o-taza hongey
Apne Rubb ki taraf dekh rahey hongey
Aur kuch chehrey udas hongey
Aur samajh rahey hongey ke unke saath qamar-todh bartao hone wala hai
Hargiz nahin, jab jaan halaq tak pahunch jayegi
Aur kaha jayega ke hai koi jhaad phook karne wala
Aur aadmi samajh lega ke yeh duniya se judai ka waqt hai
Aur pindli(leg) se pindli(leg) judh jayegi
Woh din hoga tere Rubb ki taraf rawangi ka
Magar usne na sach mana , aur na namaz padhi
Balke jhutlaya aur palat gaya
Phir akadta hua apne ghar walon ki taraf chal diya
Yeh rawish tere hi liye sazawaar hai aur tujh hi ko zeib deti hai
Haan yeh rawish tere hi liye sazawaar hai aur tujh hi ko zeib deti hai
Kya Insan ne yeh samajh rakkha hai ke woh yunhi mohmal (left alone, unquestioned )chodh diya jayega

ar: أَلَمۡ يَكُ نُطۡفَةࣰ مِّن مَّنِيࣲّ يُمۡنَىٰ
t: Alam yaku nutfatan min manayyin yumna
u: Kya woh ek hakeer pani ka nutfa (sperm from semen) na tha jo (raham –e-madar mei) tapkaya jata hai
Phir woh ek lothda(clot) bana, phir Allah ne uska jism banaya aur uske aazaa durust kiye
Phir ussey mard aur aurat ki do qismein banayi

ar: أَلَيۡسَ ذَٰلِكَ بِقَٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يُحۡـِۧيَ ٱلۡمَوۡتَىٰ
t: Alaysa thalika biqadirin AAala an yuhyiya almawta
u: Kya woh ispar qadir nahin hai ke marne walon ko phir zinda karde

ar: هَلۡ أَتَىٰ عَلَى ٱلۡإِنسَٰنِ حِينࣱ مِّنَ ٱلدَّهۡرِ لَمۡ يَكُن شَيۡـࣰٔ ا مَّذۡكُورًا
t: Hal ata AAala alinsani heenun mina alddahri lam yakun shayan mathkooran
u: Kya Insan par la mutanahi zamane ka ek waqt aisa bhi guzra hai jab woh koi qabil e zikr cheez na tha

ar: إِنَّا خَلَقۡنَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنَ مِن نُّطۡفَةٍ أَمۡشَاجࣲ نَّبۡتَلِيهِ فَجَعَلۡنَٰهُ سَمِيعَۢا بَصِيرًا
t: Inna khalaqna alinsana min nutfatin amshajin nabtaleehi fajaAAalnahu sameeAAan baseeran
u: Humne Insan ko ek makhlut nutfey (intermingled sperm) se paida kiya taa-ke uska imtihaan lein aur is garz ke liye humne usey sunne aur dekhne wala banaya

ar: إِنَّا هَدَيۡنَٰهُ ٱلسَّبِيلَ إِمَّا شَاكِرࣰ ا وَإِمَّا كَفُورًا
t: Inna hadaynahu alssabeela imma shakiran waimma kafooran
u: Humne usey rasta dikha diya, khwa shukar karne wala baney ya kufr karne wala

ar: إِنَّآ أَعۡتَدۡنَا لِلۡكَٰفِرِينَ سَلَٰسِلَاْ وَأَغۡلَٰلࣰ ا وَسَعِيرًا
t: Inna aAAtadna lilkafireena salasila waaghlalan wasaAAeeran
u: Kufr karne walon ke liye humne zanjeerein aur tauq (fetters) aur bhadakti hui aag muhaiyya kar rakkhi hai

ar: إِنَّ ٱلۡأَبۡرَارَ يَشۡرَبُونَ مِن كَأۡسࣲ كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا كَافُورًا
t: Inna alabrara yashraboona min kasin kana mizajuha kafooran
u: Neik log (jannat mein) sharaab ke aisey sagar piyenge jinmein aabey kafoor ki aamezish (mixture) hogi

ar: عَيۡنࣰ ا يَشۡرَبُ بِهَا عِبَادُ ٱللَّهِ يُفَجِّرُونَهَا تَفۡجِيرࣰ ا
t: AAaynan yashrabu biha AAibadu Allahi yufajjiroonaha tafjeeran
u: Yeh ek behta chasma(spring) hoga jiske pani ke saath Allah ke bandey sharaab piyengey aur jahan chahengey ba-sahulat uski shakhein (nikal) lengey

ar: يُوفُونَ بِٱلنَّذۡرِ وَيَخَافُونَ يَوۡمࣰ ا كَانَ شَرُّهُۥ مُسۡتَطِيرࣰ ا
t: Yoofoona bialnnathri wayakhafoona yawman kana sharruhu mustateeran
u: Yeh woh log hongey jo (duniya mein) nazar poori karte hain, aur us din se darte hain jiski aafat har taraf phaili hui hogi

ar: وَيُطۡعِمُونَ ٱلطَّعَامَ عَلَىٰ حُبِّهِۦ مِسۡكِينࣰ ا وَيَتِيمࣰ ا وَأَسِيرًا
t: WayutAAimona alttaAAama AAala hubbihi miskeenan wayateeman waaseeran
u: Aur Allah ki muhabbat mein miskeen aur yateem aur qaidi ko khana khilate hain

ar: إِنَّمَا نُطۡعِمُكُمۡ لِوَجۡهِ ٱللَّهِ لَا نُرِيدُ مِنكُمۡ جَزَآءࣰ وَلَا شُكُورًا
t: Innama nutAAimukum liwajhi Allahi la nureedu minkum jazaan wala shukooran
u: Aur unse kehte hain ke (hum tumhein sirf) Allah ki khatir khila rahey hain, hum tumse na koi badla chahte hain na shukriya

ar: إِنَّا نَخَافُ مِن رَّبِّنَا يَوۡمًا عَبُوسࣰ ا قَمۡطَرِيرࣰ ا
t: Inna nakhafu min rabbina yawman AAaboosan qamtareeran
u: Humey to apne Rubb se us din ke azaab ka khauf lahiq hai jo sakht museebat ka intehayi taweel din hoga

ar: فَوَقَىٰهُمُ ٱللَّهُ شَرَّ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡيَوۡمِ وَلَقَّىٰهُمۡ نَضۡرَةࣰ وَسُرُورࣰ ا
t: Fawaqahumu Allahu sharra thalika alyawmi walaqqahum nadratan wasurooran
u: Pas Allah taala unhein us din ke sharr se bacha lega aur unhein taazgi aur suroor bakshega

ar: وَجَزَىٰهُم بِمَا صَبَرُواْ جَنَّةࣰ وَحَرِيرࣰ ا
u: Aur unke sabr ke badle mein unhein jannat aur reshmi libas ata karega

ar: مُّتَّكِـِٔينَ فِيهَا عَلَى ٱلۡأَرَآئِكِۖ لَا يَرَوۡنَ فِيهَا شَمۡسࣰ ا وَلَا زَمۡهَرِيرࣰ ا
t: Muttakieena feeha AAala alaraiki la yarawna feeha shamsan wala zamhareeran
u: Wahan woh unchey masnadon par takiye lagaye baithey hongey, na unhein dhoop ki garmi satayegi na jaadey ki thirr (bitter cold)

ar: وَدَانِيَةً عَلَيۡهِمۡ ظِلَٰلُهَا وَذُلِّلَتۡ قُطُوفُهَا تَذۡلِيلࣰ ا
t: Wadaniyatan AAalayhim thilaluha wathullilat qutoofuha tathleelan
u: Jannat ki chaaon unpar jhuki hui saaya kar rahi hogi,aur uske phal har waqt unke bas mein hongey(ke jis tarah chahey unhein todh lein)

ar: وَيُطَافُ عَلَيۡهِم بِـَٔانِيَةࣲ مِّن فِضَّةࣲ وَأَكۡوَابࣲ كَانَتۡ قَوَارِيرَا۠
t: Wayutafu AAalayhim bianiyatin min fiddatin waakwabin kanat qawareera
u: Unke aagey chandi ke bartan aur sheshey ke pyale gardish karaye ja rahey hongey

ar: قَوَارِيرَاْ مِن فِضَّةࣲ قَدَّرُوهَا تَقۡدِيرࣰ ا
u: Sheshey bhi woh jo chandi ki qisam ke hongey,aur unko (muntazmin-e-jannat nay)theek andazey ke mutabik bhara hoga

ar: وَيُسۡقَوۡنَ فِيهَا كَأۡسࣰ ا كَانَ مِزَاجُهَا زَنجَبِيلًا
t: Wayusqawna feeha kasan kana mizajuha zanjabeelan
u: Unko wahan aisi sharaab ke jaam pilaye jayenge jis mein soont (ginger) ki aamezish hogi

ar: عَيۡنࣰ ا فِيهَا تُسَمَّىٰ سَلۡسَبِيلࣰ ا
u: Yeh jannat ka ek chasma hoga jisey salsabil kaha jata hai

ar: ۞وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيۡهِمۡ وِلۡدَٰنࣱ مُّخَلَّدُونَ إِذَا رَأَيۡتَهُمۡ حَسِبۡتَهُمۡ لُؤۡلُؤࣰ ا مَّنثُورࣰ ا
t: Wayatoofu AAalayhim wildanun mukhalladoona itha raaytahum hasibtahum luluan manthooran
u: Unki khidmat ke liye aisey ladke daudte phir rahey hongey jo hamesha ladke hi rahenge.Tum unhein dekho to samjho ke moti(pearls) hai jo bikhair diye gaye hain

ar: وَإِذَا رَأَيۡتَ ثَمَّ رَأَيۡتَ نَعِيمࣰ ا وَمُلۡكࣰ ا كَبِيرًا
t: Waitha raayta thamma raayta naAAeeman wamulkan kabeeran
u: Wahan jidhar bhi tum nigah dalogey niyamatein hi niyamatein aur ek badi sultanat ka sar o saman tumhein nazar aayega

ar: عَٰلِيَهُمۡ ثِيَابُ سُندُسٍ خُضۡرࣱ وَإِسۡتَبۡرَقࣱۖ وَحُلُّوٓاْ أَسَاوِرَ مِن فِضَّةࣲ وَسَقَىٰهُمۡ رَبُّهُمۡ شَرَابࣰ ا طَهُورًا
t: AAaliyahum thiyabu sundusin khudrun waistabraqun wahulloo asawira min fiddatin wasaqahum rabbuhum sharaban tahooran
u: Unke upar bareek resham ke sabz libas aur atlas o deba ke kapde (rich brocade)hongey, unko chandi ke kangan pehnaye jayenge , aur unka Rubb unko nihayat pakeeza sharaab pilaeyga

ar: إِنَّ هَٰذَا كَانَ لَكُمۡ جَزَآءࣰ وَكَانَ سَعۡيُكُم مَّشۡكُورًا
t: Inna hatha kana lakum jazaan wakana saAAyukum mashkooran
u: Yeh hai tumhari jaza aur tumhari kaar-guzari qabil-e-qadr thehri hai

ar: إِنَّا نَحۡنُ نَزَّلۡنَا عَلَيۡكَ ٱلۡقُرۡءَانَ تَنزِيلࣰ ا
t: Inna nahnu nazzalna AAalayka alqurana tanzeelan
u: Aey Nabi, humne hi tumpar yeh Quran thoda thoda karke nazil kiya hai

ar: فَٱصۡبِرۡ لِحُكۡمِ رَبِّكَ وَلَا تُطِعۡ مِنۡهُمۡ ءَاثِمًا أَوۡ كَفُورࣰ ا
t: Faisbir lihukmi rabbika wala tutiAA minhum athiman aw kafooran
u: Lihaza tum apne Rubb ke hukum par sabr karo, aur in mein se kisi badh-amal ya munkir-e-haq ki baat na maano

ar: وَٱذۡكُرِ ٱسۡمَ رَبِّكَ بُكۡرَةࣰ وَأَصِيلࣰ ا
u: Apne Rubb ka naam subh-o-shaam yaad karo

ar: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ فَٱسۡجُدۡ لَهُۥ وَسَبِّحۡهُ لَيۡلࣰ ا طَوِيلًا
t: Wamina allayli faosjud lahu wasabbihhu laylan taweelan
u: Raat ko bhi uske huzoor sajda raiz ho, Aur raat ke taveel auqat mein uski tasbeeh karte raho

ar: إِنَّ هَٰٓؤُلَآءِ يُحِبُّونَ ٱلۡعَاجِلَةَ وَيَذَرُونَ وَرَآءَهُمۡ يَوۡمࣰ ا ثَقِيلࣰ ا
t: Inna haolai yuhibboona alAAajilata wayatharoona waraahum yawman thaqeelan
u: Yeh log to jaldi hasil honay wali cheez (duniya ) se muhabbat rakhte hai aur aagey jo bhaari din aane wala hai usey nazar andaz kardetey hain

ar: نَّحۡنُ خَلَقۡنَٰهُمۡ وَشَدَدۡنَآ أَسۡرَهُمۡۖ وَإِذَا شِئۡنَا بَدَّلۡنَآ أَمۡثَٰلَهُمۡ تَبۡدِيلًا
t: Nahnu khalaqnahum washadadna asrahum waitha shina baddalna amthalahum tabdeelan
u: Humne hi inko paida kiya hai aur inke jodh bandh mazboot kiye hai, aur hum jab chahein inki shakalon ko badal kar rakh dein

ar: إِنَّ هَٰذِهِۦ تَذۡكِرَةࣱۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ سَبِيلࣰ ا
t: Inna hathihi tathkiratun faman shaa ittakhatha ila rabbihi sabeelan
u: Yeh ek nasihat hai,ab jiska jee chahey apne Rubb ki taraf jaane ka rasta ikhtiyar karle

ar: وَمَا تَشَآءُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُۚ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ كَانَ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمࣰ ا
t: Wama tashaoona illa an yashaa Allahu inna Allaha kana AAaleeman hakeeman
u: Aur tumharey chahne se kuch nahin hota jab tak ke Allah na chachey, yaqeenan Allah bada Aleem-o-Haqeem hai

ar: يُدۡخِلُ مَن يَشَآءُ فِي رَحۡمَتِهِۦۚ وَٱلظَّٰلِمِينَ أَعَدَّ لَهُمۡ عَذَابًا أَلِيمَۢا
t: Yudkhilu man yashao fee rahmatihi waalththalimeena aAAadda lahum AAathaban aleeman
u: Apni rehmat mein jisko chahta hai daakhil karta hai, Aur zalimon ke liye usne dardnaak azaab tayyar kar rakkha hai
Kasam hai un ( hawaon) ki jo pai dar pai bheji jati hain
Phir toofani raftar se chalti hai
Aur (baadalon ko) utha kar phailati hai
Phir (unko) phaad kar juda karti hai
Phir (dilon mei khuda ki)yaad daalti hai
Uzar (justification) ke taur par ya daravey ke taur par
Jis cheez ka tumse wada kiya ja raha hai woh zaroor waqey honay wali hai
Phir jab sitarey maand (extinguish) pad jayengey
Aur aasmaan phaad diya jayega
Aur pahad dhunak daaley jayengey (blown away)
Aur Rasoolon ki haziri ka waqt aa pahunchega (us roz woh cheez waqey ho jaeygi)
Kis roz ke liye yeh kaam utha rakha gaya hai
Faisley ke roz ke liye
Aur tumhein kya khabar ke woh faisley ka din kya hai
Tabahi hai us din jhutlane walon ke liye
Kya humne aglon ko halaq nahin kiya
Phir unhi ke pichey hum baad walon ko chalta karengey
Mujrimo ke saath hum yahi kuch kiya karte hain
Tabahi hai us din jhutlaney walon ke liye
Kya humne ek hakeer pani se tumhein paida nahin kiya
Aur ek mukarrara muddat tak
Usey ek mehfooz jagah thehraye rakkha
To dekho , hum ispar qadir thay, pas hum bahut acchi qudrat rakhne waley hain
Tabahi hai us roz jhutlaney walon ke liye
Kya humne zameen ko sameth kar rakhne wali nahin banaya
Zindon ke liye bhi aur murdon ke liye bhi

ar: وَجَعَلۡنَا فِيهَا رَوَٰسِيَ شَٰمِخَٰتࣲ وَأَسۡقَيۡنَٰكُم مَّآءࣰ فُرَاتࣰ ا
t: WajaAAalna feeha rawasiya shamikhatin waasqaynakum maan furatan
u: Aur is mein buland-o-bala pahad jamaye, Aur tumhein meetha pani pilaya
Tabahi hai us roz jhutlaney walon ke liye

ar: ٱنطَلِقُوٓاْ إِلَىٰ مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تُكَذِّبُونَ
t: Intaliqoo ila ma kuntum bihi tukaththiboona
u: Chalo ab usi cheez ki taraf jisey tum jhutlaya karte thay

ar: ٱنطَلِقُوٓاْ إِلَىٰ ظِلࣲّ ذِي ثَلَٰثِ شُعَبࣲ‏
t: Intaliqoo ila thillin thee thalathi shuAAabin
u: Chalo us saaye ki taraf jo teen shaakhon(columns) wala hai

ar: لَّا ظَلِيلࣲ وَلَا يُغۡنِي مِنَ ٱللَّهَبِ
t: La thaleelin wala yughnee mina allahabi
u: Na thandak pahunchane wala aur na aag ki lapat se bachane wala
woh aag mahal (castles/fortress) jaisi badi badi chingariyan phenkegi
(Jo uchalti hui yun mehsus hongi )goya ke woh zard ount (camel) hai
Tabahi hai us roz jhutlaney walon ke liye
Yeh woh din hai jismein wo na kuch bolengey
Aur na unhein mauka diya jaeyga ke koi uzr(excuse) pesh karein
Tabahi hai us din jhutlaney walon ke liye
Yeh faisley ka din hai humne tumhein aur tumse pehle guzrey huey logon ko jamaa kardiya hai
Ab agar koi chaal tum chal sakte ho to mere muqabley mein chal dekho
Tabahi hai us din jhutlaney walon ke liye
Muttaqi log aaj saayon aur chashmon mein hai
Aur jo phal woh chahein (unke liye hazir hai)

ar: كُلُواْ وَٱشۡرَبُواْ هَنِيٓـَٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمۡ تَعۡمَلُونَ
t: Kuloo waishraboo haneean bima kuntum taAAmaloona
u: Khao aur piyo mazey se apne un aamal ke siley mein jo tum karte rahey ho
Hum neik logon ko aisi hi jaza detay hain
Tabahi hai us roz jhutlaney walon ke liye
Kha lo aur mazey karlo thodey din, haqeeqat mein tum log mujrim ho
Tabahi hai us roz jhutlaney walon ke liye

ar: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمُ ٱرۡكَعُواْ لَا يَرۡكَعُونَ
t: Waitha qeela lahumu irkaAAoo la yarkaAAoona
u: Jab inse kaha jata hai ke (Allah ke aagey) jhuko to nahin jhuktey
Tabahi hai uss roz jhutlaney walon ke liye
Ab is (Quran) ke baad aur kaunsa kalaam aisa ho sakta hai jispar yeh iman layein
